title: Prop Firm Trader (FX / Futures / Crypto)
description:
Hello Traders!



Isla Capital is growing — and we’re looking to bring on disciplined, serious traders to join our team of elite traders.



We work with experienced prop firm traders to trade evaluation and funded accounts through firms such as FTMO, Apex, Alpha Capital Group, and similar platforms.



This opportunity is designed for Filipino professionals who understand prop firm rules, respect risk, and can trade with consistency and control.



This is not a casual trading role — it is a structured, performance-driven environment with a clear path toward higher earnings and long-term growth. Over time, this role will expand into live portfolio trading, where earning potential increases significantly.



What You’ll Do...



• Trade prop firm evaluation (challenge) accounts and funded accounts

• Strictly follow all prop firm rules and drawdown limits

• Maintain daily trading journals

• Provide consistent performance updates



What We’re Looking For...



• Experience trading prop firm accounts strongly preferred (or extensive live trading in lieu of prop firm experience)

• Strong risk management and discipline

• Ability to work independently

• Honest and reliable communication

• Understanding of scalping and/or day trading strategies



Compensation & Growth...



• Weekly base salary potential

• Bonus for passing evaluations / challenges

• Profit sharing on funded account payouts

• Performance bonuses based on payout milestones

• Access to in-house coaching from experienced traders

>> Upon certain milestones, we will also purchase additional prop accounts with copy trade software to multiply earnings



Important Notes...



• Accounts must be registered under the trader’s name (per prop firm rules), but all accounts and profits are part of Isla Capital

• All prop firm fees and account costs are fully covered by Isla Capital

• Strict confidentiality is required



Who This Is For...



This is a performance-first opportunity for traders who take their craft seriously.



We are building a system where disciplined Filipino traders can earn meaningful income and grow long-term within a structured trading environment.



If you are consistent, controlled, and committed — this could be a strong fit.



How to Apply...



Please apply and include:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your prop firm experience and/or live trading 

• Your trading style and psychology

• Resume or link to resume (if available)



Let's build something serious together!

title: Admin & Receptionist (Remote - Australian NDIS Provider)
description:
We are an Australian NDIS provider, The Positive Behaviour Support Group (PBSG), seeking a full-time Virtual Assistant / Remote Receptionist to support administrative and client communication tasks. This is a long-term role with strong growth potential as the business expands.



Role Overview

This position is structured and process-driven, requiring a high level of professionalism, attention to detail, and strong communication skills. You will follow detailed SOPs and templates to deliver consistent, high-quality service to families, support coordinators, and stakeholders.



Important:

This is a full-time role where availability and reliability are critical. While workload will continue to grow over time, you must be consistently available during working hours to manage enquiries, respond promptly, and support incoming communication.



Responsibilities

- Manage incoming enquiries via
 and online channels

- Respond to new client enquiries and guide stakeholders through the referral process

- Gather key intake information accurately and efficiently

- Maintain clear, calm, and professional communication at all times

- Record notes and update systems (training provided)

- Assist with scheduling, follow-ups, and general administrative coordination

- Support onboarding and intake processes for new participants

- Maintain and update internal tracking systems, including participant and practitioner trackers

- Monitor key workflows to ensure tasks are completed and follow-ups are not missed

- Assist with setting up new participants, contacts, and relevant information in internal systems

- Support practitioner onboarding and administration, including documentation and system setup

- Assist with organising, filtering, and coordinating job applications and interviews

- Help manage recruitment processes, including shortlisting candidates and scheduling interviews

- Perform general administrative tasks to support daily business operations and growth

- Adapt to new systems, tools, and responsibilities as the business continues to expand



Phone Responsibilities (Current / Future)

- Be available during working hours to answer incoming calls as the phone system is implemented

- Return missed calls promptly and professionally

- Follow structured call scripts and communication standards

- Escalate complex or sensitive matters appropriately



Future Responsibilities (as the role expands)

 - Answering and returning phone calls via our business number

 - Handling inbound enquiries using structured call scripts and professional phone etiquette

 - Escalating complex or sensitive matters appropriately



Requirements

- Excellent written and spoken English (very strong communication is essential)

- Professional, warm, and calm communication style

- Strong attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes

- Ability to handle sensitive conversations appropriately

- Reliable internet connection and quiet working environment

- Proficient in IT systems, including Microsoft 365, Microsoft Office, and Outlook

- Comfortable learning and using practice management systems and custom dashboards

- Confident navigating multiple systems and tools efficiently

- Previous experience in admin, customer service, or healthcare is highly regarded



Ideal Candidate

 - Comfortable following clear systems and SOPs

 - Takes initiative but does not guess when unsure

 - Communicates professionally without being overly casual

 - Able to build rapport while maintaining boundaries

 - Reliable, consistent, and responsive



Please only apply if you are confident in your communication skills and ability to meet a high professional standard.

We are hiring for a long-term, high-quality position and will be screening applications thoroughly. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. This is a long-term role, and we are looking for someone who wants stability, growth, and to become a key part of our team.



Pay is $8 USD/hour, with a 13th month bonus provided.



We provide high-quality SOPs, structured systems, ongoing check-ins, training, and support. Our goal is to develop a strong, long-term working relationship with someone who can become a core part of our organisation’s operations, culture, and systems.

title: Remote Senior Nonprofit Bookkeeper
description:
About Us

We are a USA-based accounting and advisory firm dedicated exclusively to serving nonprofit organizations and mental health practices. We manage the complete accounting cycle for a portfolio of nonprofit clients simultaneously, delivering accurate, timely, and audit-ready financial records. Our clients trust us with the financial foundation of their missions. Every tea
mber we bring on is expected to perform at a professional level from day one, follow our documented systems, and take genuine ownership of their client portfolio.



About the Role

We are seeking a highly motivated, detail-oriented Senior Bookkeeper to join our team. In this role, you will oversee comprehensive bookkeeping functions, ensuring accuracy and compliance across all financial records for a portfolio of nonprofit clients. You will work within our established systems and be held to firm-wide standards of accuracy and deadlines from day one.



This is not an entry-level role. You are expected to arrive with a fully developed competency in nonprofit accounting and the professional judgment to apply it independently across multiple clients in a remote environment.



Responsibilities

- Record and classify all transactions on an accrual basis with proper account coding, class tracking, and fund designation.

- Manage and maintain the general ledger in accordance with GAAP.

- Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable: enter vendor bills, process payments, record invoices, and apply receipts accurately.

- Prepare and post all month-end journal entries, including accruals, prepaid amortization, depreciation, and deferred revenue schedules.

- Conduct balance sheet reconciliation and review financial statements for discrepancies or errors.

- Record payroll allocation entries across cost centers, grants, and functional expense categories.

- Track restricted grants, donor contributions, and program expenses in compliance with nonprofit accounting standards.

- Produce and deliver month-end financial statements for management review.

- Support the Form 990 and audit preparation process by maintaining clean, organized records and preparing schedules as requested.

- Maintain meticulous records of journal entries, account analyses, and audit documentation to ensure audit readiness.

- Utilize accounting software, including QuickBooks Online and Xero, to manage bookkeeping operations.

- Identify opportunities to automate financial processes and increase efficiency.

- Deliver clear, accurate financial reports for internal review, client communication, and external audits.



Qualifications

 - Minimum 5 years of nonprofit accounting experience with demonstrated ability to apply accrual accounting, fund accounting, net asset classifications under ASU
, grant tracking, and functional expense allocation independently and without supervision.

 - Demonstrated ability to apply ASC 606 and ASC 842 standards, specifically managing revenue recognition based on grant documents, funder restrictions, and milestones.

- Experience managing multiple clients simultaneously in an outsourced accounting firm or agency setting.

- Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online (QBO), Xero, Sage, and other financial management tools.

- Advanced proficiency in project and work management tools such as Asana, Gmail, Google Sheets, Microsoft Excel, 
, Ramp, and similar platforms.

- Deep understanding of GAAP, double-entry bookkeeping, bank reconciliation, and general ledger reconciliation.

- Familiarity with governmental accounting practices and tax experience is highly desirable.

- Excellent knowledge of financial concepts, including account analysis, account reconciliation, debits and credits, journal entries, and balance sheet management.

- Ability to context-shift between multiple clients and thrive in a fast-paced, remote environment.

- Strong attention to detail and analytical skills to interpret complex financial data accurately.

- Effective written communication skills for financial reporting and client correspondence.

- High integrity, accountability, and respect for client confidentiality.

- Minimum 12 consecutive months of fully remote, self-directed work with independent deadline management.

- Problem-solving mentality with a proactive approach to process improvement and continuous learning.



Schedule and Compensation

- Part-time: 15 hours per week, with required availability between 8:00 AM and 3:00 PM EST // 9 pm and 2 am Philippines time. Hours are expected to increase to full-time as performance benchmarks are met, and the client portfolio grows

- Compensation details: $8 per hour for a trial period (1-3 months) and $10 per hour (post-trial period) 



To Apply: To be considered for this position, your application must include the following, submitted together in a single
:

 - Your resume

 - A brief message describing your experience with nonprofit fund accounting and at least one outsourced or multi-client accounting environment you have supported

- The answer to the following question, included at the top of your message: "What is the net asset classification framework introduced under ASU
, and how does it differ from the previous two-category model?"



Applications that do not follow these instructions exactly will not be reviewed.

title: AI Video Operator (Replication + Editing | Full Workflow)
description:
We are hiring an AI video operator to create short-form videos (15–45 seconds) by replicating existing high-performing content.



You will be given:



Reference videos

Scripts

Access to AI tools



Your job is to recreate the same video using a different avatar/subject and deliver a fully finished video ready to post.



This is a system-based role. You will be trained on our exact workflow and are expected to follow it precisely.

What You’ll Do

Watch a reference video and break it into scenes

Recreate each scene using AI (image/video generation)

Use prompting to generate realistic visuals

Animate scenes (Veo, Kling, or similar tools)

Add voice (ElevenLabs or similar)

Edit everything together into a final video (cuts, pacing, timing)

Deliver a complete, polished video



Requirements

Experience with AI tools (video, image generation, or voice tools)

Basic understanding of prompting (how to generate consistent visuals)

Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

Ability to follow instructions EXACTLY

Strong attention to detail (framing, lighting, realism)

Comfortable with repetitive, system-based work

Reliable and available to work daily

Good English communication

IMPORTANT



This is not a creative role.



You must be able to:



Look at a video

Replicate the same structure, pacing, and style

Execute consistently using a defined system



Please list experience with ai tools to create videos as well as with video editing. Please include screenshots of proof of you using the tools as well as video examples using ai to create fully made ai videos. 



If you cannot follow a structured process, do not apply.

title: Executive Assistant / Chief of Staff — Startup Co-Founder (Long-term, 30+ Hours/Week)
description:
READ THIS FIRST

This application requires a 3-minute Loom video. Applications without one will not be reviewed. We watch every Loom we receive. If yours is generic or clearly recycled from other applications, we'll notice.



========================================



ABOUT US

We're two US-based co-founders building a services company for the medical spa industry (think: nice salons that also offer Botox and laser treatments). The industry is growing fast, and most of these businesses are owned by solo operators who are drowning in the day-to-day of running them. We help them get their time and their business back.



We're at the very beginning — you would be our first hire. This means you will see how a company gets built from zero. Your work will directly shape how we run the business going forward. What you build in your first 90 days becomes the playbook for everyone who joins after you. We want someone who wants to grow with us long-term, not someone looking for one more gig.



This is NOT a front desk role. This is NOT a data entry role. This is a "right hand" role where you help one of the founders get 10x more done.



========================================



WHAT YOU'D ACTUALLY DO

No two weeks will look the same. We're early-stage, which means there will always be a new challenge, a new opportunity, or something we haven't figured out yet. If you want a predictable, same-thing-every-day role, this isn't it. If you get energy from variety and from figuring out new things, keep reading.



A typical week might include any of the following:



RESEARCH AND PROSPECT BUILDING. Building target lists of potential customers, researching their businesses on Instagram/LinkedIn/Google, finding contact info, noting interesting angles for outreach.



DRAFTING OUTREACH. Personalized
s, LinkedIn messages, and follow-ups to prospects. I'll review and approve, and you'll learn our voice fast and get better every week.



BUILDING SOPs. Every time we do something twice, you document how we do it. Our SOP library becomes one of the most valuable things we own.



SCHEDULING AND COORDINATION. My calendar, meetings with prospects and partners, travel, follow-ups.



VENDOR RESEARCH. We work with software, compliance, marketing, and supply vendors. You'll research options, compare, and summarize for me.



INBOX AND COMMUNICATION SUPPORT. Drafting replies, flagging what's important, keeping things from falling through the cracks.



GENERAL "FIGURE IT OUT" WORK. When something new comes up and neither of us has time to do it, you take it, figure it out, and come back with a recommendation.



You will use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, others) heavily. We expect this. We don't want you writing every
 from scratch when AI can give you a first draft in 30 seconds.



========================================



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



THE MUST-HAVES:

EXCELLENT WRITTEN ENGLISH. You write clearly, professionally, and you can match different tones (warm cold outreach, crisp internal updates, formal vendor
s).



HIGH AGENCY. When you get a task, you don't wait for step-by-step instructions. You figure out what "done" looks like, clarify anything truly ambiguous upfront, and drive it to finished.



AI FLUENCY. You already use ChatGPT/Claude/similar daily. You know when to use them and when not to. You can explain how you prompt them.



COMFORTABLE TELLING ME WHEN YOU NEED MORE WORK. If you finish your tasks by Wednesday, you tell me and ask what's next. Coasting quietly is the one thing that won't work here.



RELIABLE ASYNC COMMUNICATOR. Daily check-ins, Loom videos when text is harder, clear status updates, nothing goes dark.



AVAILABLE DURING 8AM–12PM MANILA TIME for overlap with me. Rest of your hours are on your own schedule.



THE NICE-TO-HAVES:

Experience with a US small business or startup. Experience with CRM tools (HubSpot, Close, etc.). Sales/BDR background. Any healthcare, wellness, or beauty industry exposure.



YOU DO NOT NEED:

A degree. Prior med spa experience (we'll teach you).



========================================



THE DETAILS

HOURS. 30+ hours/week to start, growing to full-time (40 hours) within 120 days based on performance.



SCHEDULE. 3 hours overlap with me (9am–12pm Manila), remaining hours on your own schedule.



PAY. $11/hour straight. We're paying above the typical OnlineJobs.ph range on purpose — we want top-tier people and expect top-tier work. Quarterly performance reviews with raises for great work. Discretionary bonuses for specific wins (for example, $500 the first time an outreach campaign you built generates a closed customer).



START. As soon as we find the right person.



LONG-TERM. We want someone for the long haul. If you're building your career, we want to build it with you.



========================================



HOW TO APPLY

Please send me the following four things:



FIRST — A SHORT LOOM VIDEO (3 MINUTES MAX) introducing yourself. Tell me: who you are, what you're doing now, one project you're proud of, and why this role interests you. This is the most important part of your application. I will watch it before I read anything else.



SECOND — YOUR RESUME or a link to your profile.



THIRD — YOUR FAVORITE AI TOOL AND HOW YOU USE IT, in two or three sentences.



FOURTH — ANSWER THIS QUESTION IN YOUR APPLICATION: "You sent a cold outreach
 on my behalf. A prospect replies with a question you don't know the answer to, and I'm asleep. What do you do?"



APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A LOOM WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



========================================



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT

If your application stands out, I'll invite you to a short paid trial project ($30 flat for roughly 3 hours of work) so we can see how you think and work. The trial is a real task — the work you do will actually be useful to us.



From there, I'll pick one person for a 2-week paid trial period at the full rate, and if that goes well, we hire.



Looking forward to meeting you.

title: # Senior German-Speaking Customer Happiness Manager — Premium Health E-Commerce (Long-Term, Remote)
description:
## About Rekuria



Rekuria is a fast-growing premium health & wellness brand in the DACH market (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). Our flagship product — **Neckify**, an electronic neck massage device — helps thousands of people relieve neck pain naturally, without medication.



Our mission is simple: **free people from chronic neck pain through natural, medication-free self-care.**



We're not a typical dropshipping store. We're building a long-term health brand with a strong community, high customer LTV, and a voice that customers genuinely trust. That's where **you** come in.



---



## The Role: You Become "Rebecca"



You won't just answer tickets. You'll **become the voice of Rebecca** — Rekuria's dedicated customer care persona. Rebecca is:



- **Medically informed** — knows health topics, understands pain, speaks with authority

- **Warm & empathetic** — customers feel safe and in good hands

- **Educational** — empowers people to take action for themselves, explains the "why"

- **Fact-based & compliant** — never over-promises, never makes illegal health claims

- **Alternative-minded** — champion of natural, medication-free relief



Rebecca is the reason customers come back, tell their friends, and leave unsolicited 5-star reviews. That's the bar.



---



## Your Mission



Your success is measured by 4 numbers:



1. **Near-zero return rate** — because you solve problems before they become returns

2. **Near-zero chargeback rate** — because you spot escalations early and de-escalate

3. **High 5-star review volume** — customers review us because they want to, not because we beg

4. **Low ticket volume relative to order volume** — because you build smart automations, FAQs, and flows that prevent tickets from ever being created



If you only "answer tickets," you're not the right fit. If you want to **architect a customer experience system**, you are.



---



## What You'll Do



- Handle all customer conversations across *
 (Gorgias), Instagram DMs, TikTok DMs, Meta/Facebook, and WhatsApp**

- Write in Rebecca's voice: medical, professional, warm, empowering

- Proactively prevent returns and chargebacks (identify at-risk customers, reach out before they escalate)

- Build and maintain **SOPs, macros, FAQs, and Klaviyo post-purchase flows** that reduce repetitive tickets

- Solicit UGC and 5-star reviews at the right 
nts

- Stay 100% compliant with **German health advertising law (HWG), Medical Device Regulation (MDR/MPG), and Meta/Google health ad policies**

- Document everything in Notion, record Loom walkthroughs, use Claude and modern AI tools to work smarter

- Report weekly on KPIs and propose improvements



---



## Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)



- **3+ years** of E-Commerce customer support experience for Shopify brands

- **Direct experience in the Health / Wellness / Medical Device niche** — you understand compliance, you know what can and cannot be said

- **Fluent German (C1 minimum, native-level preferred)** — ideally from working multiple years with a German brand

- Hands-on experience with **Gorgias, Shopify, and Klaviyo**

- Familiarity with **HWG, MPG/MDR, and health ad policies on Meta + Google**

- Comfortable with **Loom, Notion, Zoom, Claude, and AI tools**

- Strong writer — can adapt tone from clinical to warm in one sentence

- Self-starter — you don't wait to be told what to do

- Stable internet, quiet workspace, reliable hours



## Nice-to-Haves



- Experience preventing chargebacks (Stripe / PayPal disputes)

- Copywriting or UGC-solicitation background

- Team lead experience (you'll onboard a second CS hire within 6–12 months if we grow together)



---



## ???????? Deutscher Abschnitt — bitte auf Deutsch beantworten



Wenn du bis hierher gekommen bist: Willkommen. Der nächste Teil ist auf Deutsch, weil du mit deutschen Kunden arbeiten wirst.



**Szenario:** Eine Kundin schreibt nach 3 Tagen: "Das Gerät hilft nicht, ich habe immer noch Schmerzen. Ich will mein Geld zurück."



**Aufgabe:** Schreibe in 3–5 Sätzen, wie Rebecca diese Nachricht beantworten würde. Keine Standardfloskeln — zeig uns, dass du die Marke verstehst.



(Falls du diesen Abschnitt nicht verstehst oder nicht auf Deutsch antworten kannst, ist diese Rolle nicht die richtige für dich — das ist völlig okay, wir suchen den perfekten Fit.)



---



## Work Setup



- **Hours:** 3 hours/day, 7 days/week to start (~21 hrs/week)

- **Growth path:** Can scale to full-time within 3–6 months based on performance

- **Schedule:** Must cover DACH business hours (Central European Time)

- **Location:** 100% remote

- **Compensation:** Competitive, negotiable based on experience. Senior specialists in this niche typically earn $8–$15/hr. We pay for skill, not for time.

- **Long-term:** We're looking for a multi-year partnership, not a short-term hire. As Rekuria grows, you grow with us — more hours, higher pay, leadership opportunities.



---



## How to Apply (Read Carefully — This Is a Filter)



Applications that don't follow these steps will be ignored. We're serious about hiring one excellent person, not screening 200 generic applicants.



**Step 1:** Start your application with the word **NECKIFY** on the first line. This is how we know you read the entire post.



**Step 2:** Answer these 4 questions (short, direct, no fluff):



1. Which German (or DACH) e-commerce brand(s) have you worked for? How long, and what niche? (type down their domains)

2. What's one specific example of how you prevented a return or chargeback? Walk us through the situation and what you said.

3. Which tools from our stack have you actively used (not just heard of): Gorgias, Shopify, Klaviyo, Notion, Loom, Claude?

4. What do you know about HWG and health advertising compliance in Germany?



**Step 3:** Complete the German scenario above (3–5 sentences in German).



**Step 4:** Record a **60–90 second Loom video** introducing yourself. We want to see your communication style, not your studio lighting. Share the Loom link in your application.



**Step 5 (optional but strong signal):** If you have any recorded samples of customer responses you're proud of (anonymized), link to them.



---



## What Happens Next



1. We review applications and shortlist the top 3–5 candidates

2. 30-minute paid video interview (Zoom) with the founder

3. Paid trial task: Handle 5 real customer tickets in Rebecca's voice — you get paid regardless of outcome

4. Offer to the best fit — long-term partnership, clear growth path



---



**We're building something that genuinely helps people live pain-free lives. If that mission resonates with you, and you have the skills above, we want to hear from you.**



— Rekuria

title: Graphic Designer
description:
GRAPHIC DESIGNER: FAST-TURN CREATIVE ASSETS

Full-time / Part-time | 20–40 hrs/week | Remote | Long-term Relationship



WE MOVE FAST.

If you thrive under tight deadlines and can produce polished work quickly, this role was built for you.



ABOUT US

We're a marketing agency called Motive (
) serving personal brands. We handle social media, video, podcasts, ads, slide decks, keynote presentations, and web projects for a range of high-profile clients, and we need a graphic designer who can keep up with our growth.



This is a long-term position. We're not looking for a one-off freelancer. We want someone who becomes a trusted part of our creative team and grows with us.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Design social media graphics, story templates, carousels, and branded content, often within same-day turnaround.

- Create thumbnails, event graphics, promotional materials, and presentation assets.

- Resize and adapt existing assets across multiple platforms and formats quickly.

- Maintain brand consistency across multiple client accounts simultaneously.

- Receive feedback and revise assets fast. We often need a second version within an hour.

- Organize and manage design files in shared folders so the team can always find what they need.

- Collaborate directly with our team via Slack throughout your day.



MUST-HAVES



Tools:

- Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator

- Adobe InDesign (a plus)

- Google Drive or Dropbox file management



Skills & traits:

- Strong typography and layout sense

- Excellent English comprehension

- Comfortable receiving fast, direct feedback

- Available during US Central Time hours



WHAT SETS THE RIGHT PERSON APART



We're not looking for the most technically advanced designer. We're looking for someone who is fast, reliable, and easy to work with. You take direction well, ask clarifying questions upfront, and don't disappear when things get busy. You know how to work across multiple brand styles without blending them together.



Experience in faith-based, nonprofit, or speaker/coaching content is a bonus, but not required.



POSITION DETAILS:

Hours: 20–40 hrs/week (flexible based on workload)

Type: Long-term, ongoing

Timezone: Must have strong overlap with US Central Time (CST)

Communication: Slack. Responsive during work hours if possible.

Portfolio: Required. Link in your application.



HOW TO APPLY:

Include a link to your portfolio or samples of recent work. In the first line of your message, write "Graphic Designer: I read the full post". This tells us you pay attention to details. Bonus: share one project you're especially proud of and what made it challenging.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Part-Time Content Creator + Admin Support
description:
About Nokvex



Nokvex is a Philippines-based content studio serving remote agencies and freelancers across Australia and North America. We offer flexible payment in USD or PHP, treat our team as long-term partners, and keep communication clear and respectful.



---



The Role



We're looking for a Part-Time Content Creator with light admin support responsibilities. This is a long-term role with a clear path to full-time.



20 hours/week | $300/month USD ($70/week) | Weekly payment | Starting immediately



---



Schedule



- 20 hours/week distributed across Monday to Friday primarily

- Flexible - you choose your daily hours within PHT business time

- Occasional weekend support (max 2x/month) for urgent content or time-sensitive posts

- Results-based, not hour-based monitoring



---

, TikTok

5. Light Admin Support (10%)

   - File organization (Google Drive)

   - Basic research tasks (competitor analysis, data gathering)

   - Spreadsheet updates

---



Growth Path



As our content volume grows, this role will evolve:



- Month 4-6: Hours may increase to 30-40 hrs/week, salary $450-$600

- Month 7-12: Option for full-time at $650-$800/month

- Scope will narrow to specialization (video editing + graphic design focus)

- SMM and admin tasks will transfer to other tea
mbers

Who You Are

---



What We Offer

- Occasional weekend availability for time-sensitive tasks (max 2x/month)

---



How to Apply

Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 3 days and reply to everyone.



Learn more at

title: Experienced GoHighLevel Automation & Systems Specialist
description:
I am looking to hire a highly organized, systems-driven Virtual Assistant who already has experience working inside GoHighLevel and preferably REI Reply as well.



This is not a basic VA role. I am looking for someone who truly understands backend systems, automations, workflows, pipelines, integrations, admin setup, and troubleshooting inside GoHighLevel.



I personally love systems, automation, and everything GoHighLevel can do, but I do not have the time to manage and build everything myself. I want someone who enjoys this type of work, thinks systematically, solves problems, and can eventually become the go-to person for helping me organize, build, improve, and manage the backend of my business.



I need someone who can help take ideas like:



“Set up this automation”

“Build this workflow”

“Figure out how to make the AI do this”

“Set up and manage the social media planner”

“Organize this part of the CRM”

“Troubleshoot why this isn’t working”

“Create a system for this process”



…and actually bring them to life inside GoHighLevel or REI Reply.



What I’m looking for



I am looking for someone who is:



already experienced in GoHighLevel

very comfortable with automations, workflows, triggers, pipelines, calendars, forms, websites, funnels, and CRM organization

highly organized and systematic in the way they think

a problem solver who can figure things out

detail-oriented and reliable

able to communicate clearly and professionally

proactive, not someone who needs to be micromanaged

comfortable helping with both setup and ongoing backend support

Main responsibilities



Your responsibilities may include:



Building and updating GoHighLevel workflows and automations

Setting up and managing pipelines, opportunities, tags, custom fields, calendars, forms, and funnels

Troubleshooting automation issues and system errors

Helping organize backend processes so the business runs more efficiently

Assisting with AI setup and automation-related tasks inside the platform

Managing or helping configure social media planner tools inside REI Reply / GoHighLevel

Connecting and testing integrations

Improving existing systems and suggesting better ways to do things

Documenting processes and helping create more structure over time

Preferred experience



Bonus points if you have experience with:



REI Reply

real estate or wholesaling-related CRM systems

GoHighLevel AI tools

social media planner setup inside GHL

Zapier or other integrations

SOP creation and documentation

backend admin support for online businesses

Who this role is for



This role is for someone who genuinely enjoys backend systems and automation work.



If you love cleaning up messy systems, building workflows, organizing CRM structure, solving backend problems, and making businesses run smoother through automation, this may be a great fit.



If you are more of a general VA and do not have strong GoHighLevel experience already, this role is probably not the right fit.

title: Construction Admin VA (Remote)
description:
IMPORTANT: READ BEFORE APPLYING

We are only considering candidates with real construction project management experience (commercial preferred). If you do not have this experience, please do not apply.



About the Role

We are hiring a full-time Construction Admin Virtual Assistant to support commercial tenant improvement (TI) projects ranging from 5,000 to 10,000 square feet. This role supports the full project lifecycle, from pre-acquisition through Certificate of Occupancy and final handoff.



You will work closely with general contractors, subcontractors, lenders, and city officials to ensure projects stay organized, on schedule, and compliant.



What You’ll Be Doing

In this role, you will be responsible for managing RFPs and contractor bidding by creating scopes of work, handling multiple bids per trade, building comparison sheets, and verifying contractor compliance documents such as COIs and W-9s.



You will also oversee budgeting and draw management, including maintaining monthly draw schedules, reviewing AIA G702 pay applications, collecting lien waivers, coordinating with construction lenders, tracking budgets, and processing change orders.



A key part of your role will involve coordinating with general contractors and subcontractors by maintaining project schedules, tracking daily logs and trade sequencing, and managing punch lists to ensure smooth project execution.



You will support city and municipality coordination by conducting zoning research, assisting with permit submissions, tracking approvals, and scheduling inspections.



Additionally, you will handle documentation and administrative tasks such as organizing Google Drive folders, maintaining compliance trackers, providing weekly project updates, and updating SOPs as processes evolve.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

We are looking for someone with proven construction project management experience, preferably in commercial tenant improvement projects. You must be familiar with AIA G702 pay applications and lien waivers and have daily working experience using ClickUp, Slack, Google Drive, and AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude.



Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal, are required, along with a high level of organization and attention to detail to manage strict deadlines and documentation standards.



Schedule & Compensation

This is a full-time role, Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST. The pay ranges from $12 to $14 per hour, with a $1,000 bonus for each successfully completed project. You will also receive 10 PTO days per year.



How to Apply:

To apply, please attach your updated resume(PDF) and a 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself and your construction experience.

description:
Position Overview



In2HR&Talent is seeking a detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support the CEO and Head of Growth and Client Services with internal operations and client work through strong systems management and coordination. Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

Proficient in business tools (Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, etc.)



How to Apply

1. Submit your resume

2. Provide a 1–2 minute video introduction (via web link preferred) that includes:

  Why you are interested in this role

  How your experience will contribute to customer success



Video Interview Questions

As part of our screening process, candidates will respond to the following pre-recorded video questions:

4. Why are you a strong fit for this role, and what unique value do you bring?



Next Steps

Our recruiting team will review all applications and contact qualified candidates for the next stage of the hiring process.

- Handle day-to-day sales admin 
 organization, file management, data entry, calendar coordination)

- Help document and improve repeatable processes to make the Bullpen team more efficient



Required Skills & Qualifications

- 1+ years of experience as a Virtual Assistant, sales support, order processor, or administrative assistant

- Strong familiarity with order-management or CRM platforms (experience with commonsku is a big plus, but we will provide full training)

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Extremely detail-oriented with strong organizational and multitasking skills

- Proficient in Microsoft 365

- Reliable high-speed internet, quiet workspace, and a modern computer setup

- Self-motivated, proactive, and comfortable working independently with minimal daily supervision

- Ability to work in a US time-zone overlap 



Preferred (but not required)

- Comfortable transitioning into occasional client-facing tasks 
s, status updates) in the future



What We Offer

- Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility (including client interaction)

If you thrive on accuracy, enjoy making complex order workflows run like clockwork, and want to be a key player in a growing promotional products company, we’d love to hear from you.

We review applications quickly and will move fast with the right candidate. Looking forward to welcoming you to the Bullpen team!

UI/UX design sense

Experience with EdTech or school apps

The ideal candidate is creative, reliable, organized, and proactive, with the ability to maintain a consistent online presence, communicate professionally, and be a real contributor to the business by bringing ideas, solving problems, and adding value beyond basic task completion.



• Strong written English and clear communication

• Good eye for branding, tone, and content quality

• Can follow instructions but also take initiative

• Consistent, dependable, and detail-oriented

• Able to meet deadlines and manage time well

• Previous experience with social media accounts or online communities

• Willing to contribute ideas that help improve growth, engagement, and the business overall



Subject line must start with: Media 

(Applications without this word will not be reviewed.)



1. Are you currently a student? (Yes / No)

 marketing campaigns

, or

title: Legal Case Manager and Administrative Assistant
description:
We are a fast-growing law firm focused on estate planning and probate. We are looking for a highly organized, proactive Virtual Assistant to help manage client communication, scheduling, and workflow.



This is NOT just a task-based role. You will be responsible for helping move client matters forward and ensuring no client or lead falls through the cracks.



Key Responsibilities



- Respond to new client inquiries via
 and text

- Send intake forms and follow up until completed

- Schedule consultations and send reminders

- Send engagement letters and invoices after consultations

- Open and update client matters in our case management system

- Track all active clients and ensure each matter is progressing

- Follow up with clients who have not signed or completed next steps

- Coordinate scheduling for signing appointments

- Send client updates and maintain consistent communication



What Success Looks Like



- All new leads are responded to within 1 hour during working time

- No client goes more than 24 hours without a response or next step

- Every matter has a clear next action scheduled

- The attorney does NOT need to follow up with clients—you handle it



 Requirements



- Strong written English communication (this is client-facing)

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Proactive (you follow up without being asked)

- Comfortable using
, calendars, and online systems

- Able to learn and follow systems and workflows



Bonus (not required):

- Experience with CRMs or case management software

- Experience working with law firms or real estate



This role is critical to the success of the firm. You will be a key part of ensuring clients have a smooth, professional experience and that all matters move forward efficiently.

title: SCADA Programmer
description:
We are looking for a FULL TIME Experienced Programmer.

You need to have extensive experience solving problems programmatically.

5+ Years of programming experience.

Experience in Python is preferable but not completely necessary.



We will provide all of the on-the-job training you need. This will include training about our industry (which is primarily oil and natural gas) as well as our software suite of tools.

I expect this training to take 6-8 weeks. There will then be ongoing training where we work with you individually on any problems that you cannot solve on your own. (You will be paid your normal salary during training.)



Our Company is Deep Fork Automation, and you will join a team of 9 (several who are based in the Philippines).

We work in Automation, SCADA and Remote Monitoring.







Please include your favorite sort algorithm in the subject of your application.

We hope this works out and can become a very long term employment opportunity.



Your working schedule will be PH daytime hours.  (~8AM - 6PM PH time)

During training and periodically, you will need to be on during US Day Time for work with other coworkers and meetings.

(We have weekly tea
etings at 9:30 AM CST)



Additionally, we have annual performance reviews with potential raises and bonuses.



We are mostly looking for someone who has some skill programming, is intelligent, is a very good problem solver, and is very reliable / hardworking. If this is you, please apply.  Please use 3 apply points.



As John Jonas likes to say, We're looking for someone "young and hungry".



I look forward to hearing from you,

-Rob W.

Deep Fork Automation

title: Google Ads Manager for Automotive E-Commerce Brand
description:
MyVQParts is a fast-growing e-commerce brand specializing in aftermarket parts for Nissan and Infiniti platforms. We’re known for our premium carbon fiber products, digital dash upgrades, and performance mods. Our brand has scaled rapidly through
 ads, influencer marketing, and strong community presence. Now, we’re looking to add a dedicated Google Ads expert to expand our marketing channels and scale efficiently.



We are seeking an experienced Google Ads Manager who can:



Strategize, build, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, Display, and YouTube).



Optimize campaigns for ROAS, CTR, and conversion volume.



Research keywords and audiences relevant to aftermarket automotive parts.



Continuously test creatives, targeting, and bidding strategies.



Collaborate with our team to ensure Google Ads work alongside, not against, our successful
 ads funnel.



Important Context:

We have tried Google Ads in the past, but they interfered with our
 ads conversions, which are currently our main driver of revenue. We need someone who not only understands how to scale Google Ads but also how to integrate them without cannibalizing performance from other channels.



Requirements:



Proven experience running and scaling profitable Google Ads campaigns (ideally in e-commerce).



Deep understanding of attribution, tracking, and how ads on different platforms affect one another.



Ability to analyze data and make informed decisions.



Strong communication skills and willingness to collaborate.



Familiarity with Shopify is a plus.



What We Offer:



Long-term position with growth opportunities.



Competitive salary (to be discussed based on experience).



Flexible, remote work.



Opportunity to be part of a rapidly growing automotive e-commerce brand with strong existing revenue.
salary: 200-400 usd a month depending on expe...

title: Packaging / Box Designer (Tech Products)
description:
We’re looking for a skilled packaging designer to create clean, high-end box designs for tech products. These include items like drones, robot vacuums, electronics, and smart devices sourced from Alibaba manufacturers.



You’ll be provided with:



* AI-generated mockups (concept direction)

* Exact box dieline/template from manufacturer

* Product features + branding direction



Your job is to turn that into a polished, production-ready box design that looks premium and retail-ready.



What We’re Looking For:



* Strong experience in product packaging / box design

* Ability to create modern, high-end designs (Apple-style, clean tech aesthetic)

* Attention to detail (alignment, spacing, spelling, layout accuracy)

* Experience working with dielines and print-ready files

* Ability to follow direction while also improving the design



Responsibilities:



* Design front, back, and side panels of packaging

* Add product features, icons, and visual hierarchy

* Ensure everything fits perfectly within the provided template

* Deliver final files ready for manufacturing (PDF/AI/PSD depending on need)

* Make revisions quickly based on feedback



Nice to Have:



* Experience with tech/electronics packaging

* Ability to create product renders or enhance product images

* Understanding of branding and visual consistency



Compensation:



* Per project (will discuss based on experience)

* Consistent work available for the right designer



How to Apply:

Send:



* Your portfolio (especially packaging/box designs)

* Examples of similar work (tech products preferred)

* Your rate per project



Looking for someone long-term if the quality is right.

title: Project Administrator & Assistant
description:
Disaster Solutions Australia is a leading provider of comprehensive disaster management services, specialising in helping businesses and organisations respond to and recover from emergencies. 



The Project Administrator & Assistant is responsible for supporting the efficient planning, coordination, support and delivery of projects. This role ensures that projects are executed in accordance with company standards, client expectations, and operational requirements.



Working closely with internal departments, field teams, subcontractors, and clients, the position plays a key role in maintaining accurate documentation, supporting the coordination of resources, and facilitating clear communication throughout all stages of the project lifecycle.

This role requires strong organisational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to perform in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.





Key Responsibilities:

• Create and set up new projects in internal systems accurately and in a timely manner

• Ensure all project details, scopes, client information, and job data are correctly entered

• Maintain and continuously update project files to reflect current status and changes

• Ensure all required documentation is uploaded, stored, and easily accessible

• Assisting the implementation of projects, including client and customer communications, coordination of field staff and trades, and collecting field data from trades and staff.

• Tracking projects to ensure they continually address defined objectives and produce the committed deliverables.

• Compiling results and producing project reports, including outcomes and progress of works and communicating these with the customers and the clients daily.

• Coordination for the delivery of services effectively and efficiently. 

• Maintaining communication logs for all project-related correspondence

• Support Estimators/Supervisors with cross-service integration efforts to achieve a seamless client experience.

• Assist in maintaining positive client and customer relations throughout all project phases.

• Assist in the evaluation and solution of potential field problems, escalating them to the Project Coordinator Team Leader if necessary.

• Development of costings associated with new internal projects

• Assist in scope analysis to provide clear, documented, and coordinated interpretations to the field teams

• Conduct quality control activities of field work, your reports, etc and ensure your KPIs are met.

• Ensure all projects are updated and accurately created, produced, and generate documents.

• Coordinate and participate in an ongoing project, research, and analysis on cost in relation to workforce management are being captured effectively 

• Assist with field staff requests to resolve field issues.

• Scheduling field staff and trades and tracking all assigned projects to ensure they continually address defined objectives and produce the committed deliverables.



To be eligible and considered for the role the following must be included in your application:

• Cover letter must include Disaster Solutions Australia

• Cover letter must include job role

• Cover letter must include date of your application

title: Salesperson
description:
FULL TIME EXPERIENCED SALESPERSON.  EASTERN TIME: 9am Eastern until 6pm Eastern



PERFECT SPOKEN ENGLISH WITN NO ACCENT & GREAT WRITING SKILLS REQUIRED.



If you have not taken Accent Reduction course, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY.  



You MUST submit A VOICE RECORDING OF YOU INTRODUCING YOURSELF TO ME IN ENGLISH to demonstrate that your English sounds American. 



EXPERIENCE WITH AMAZON IS A HUGE PLUS...but not required.



Our clients are people, companies and brands that have products being sold in the US on Amazon.  We also help people that work for or formerly worked for Amazon.  We are a New York based law firm where we all work on Eastern time zone.  



We seek an experienced, energetic, self-motivated salesperson WITH PERFECT ACCENT-FREE SPOKEN ENGLISH and Great English Writing Skills to learn about the services our firm provides and then train with and join our Sales Team.  



Our process is as follows:  people with problems with Amazon contact us online,
 and by phone.  We call them on the telephone and if we think we can win their case, we offer to help them.  ALL OF THE WORK FOR THE CLIENTS IS DONE BY OUR PARALEGALS AND LAWYERS IN NEW YORK and FLORIDA (two states within the US).  



Since the applicant will be making and receiving phone calls from Americans, we need someone without an accent.  This is vital to the position. 



BEFORE applying for this position, please review our recent YouTube videos and our social media posts for Amazon Sellers Lawyer on
,
, Instagram and our YouTube channel so that you will have an idea of what we do.




 



REQUIREMENTS:

1. Perfect accent-free spoken English - THIS IS REQUIRED.  If your English has an accent, this position is not for you.

PLEASE USE THIS LINK TO SUBMIT A VOICE RECORDING OF YOU INTRODUCING YOURSELF TO ME IN ENGLISH. 



2  Prior Sales Experience.  THIS IS REQUIRED.  I am referring to salesmanship, not merely taking orders for products.  



3. You MUST be located in or near Manila so that you can participate in monthly or bi-monthly in person tea
etings when the pandemic is over.  I intend to travel to Manilla starting in May for tea
etings every 60 days.  We have hired people that were able to travel to Manila for the anticipated meetings.



4. Monthly Salary paid via Payoneer.  You MUST have a Payoneer account and be able to be paid at the end of each month.  



5. Work on EASTERN TIME.  Please do not apply unless you can work on Eastern time zone.  VERY IMPORTANT - SINCE YOU WILL BE ON THE TELEPHONE THAT WE PROVIDE TO YOU, YOU MUST HAVE A QUIET WORK PLACE.  We have had issues where there are noises from roosters crowing in the background.  When you are calling potential clients, you must have a quiet place from which to place the calls and to accept calls.



6. Great Written English.  For every client that we accept, we send a written retainer agreement.  You will have to edit the documents and therefore need great writing skills.



7. You own high speed internet connection & Computer.  You must be able to use our VOiP phone system and participate in multiple video conferences via 
pensation:

1. Commensurate with Sales Experience and Spoken & Written English skills.  

2. 13th Month Bonus payable one-half in June and one-half in December

3. 10 Paid Days Off per year after 6 months with the 
n be used 5 days, at most, 5 days at a time.  The 10 days includes both sick and holiday time combined for a total of 10 days per year.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
Job Title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Remote – Performance Driven)

About Us

We are Umteen Company Digital Marketing, a fast-growing agency based in Vancouver, Canada. We help service-based businesses (construction, medi spas, local businesses) grow through SEO, paid ads, and high-converting websites.

We’re looking for a hungry, driven Cold Caller / Appointment Setter who can generate conversations and book qualified discovery calls.



Role Overview

Your main responsibility is to call leads, qualify prospects, and strictly set appointments for our sales team.

You will not be responsible for closing deals — your role is to generate opportunities and hand them off to our Account Executives.

This is a high-volume, performance-based role — if you’re not comfortable making 100+ calls per day, this is not for you.



Responsibilities

Make 100+ outbound calls daily using our lead sheet

Speak with business owners / decision-makers

Qualify leads and identify opportunities

Book appointments directly into our calendar

Hand off qualified leads to Account Executives

Update call outcomes in our tracking sheet / CRM

Follow call scripts while staying natural and conversational





Daily Targets (KPIs)

???? 100+ calls per day

???? 10–20 conversations

???? 3–5 booked appointments

???? 1–3 high-quality opportunities



Compensation

$400 CAD/month base

Uncapped commission (based on booked appointments & performance)

High performers have strong earning potential



Growth Opportunity

Clear path to move into an Account Executive (AE) role

Opportunity to close deals with significantly higher compensation + commission

We promote from within — top performers will grow quickly



What We’re Looking For

Strong English communication skills

Confident on the phone (not afraid of rejection)

Sales or call center experience preferred

Self-motivated and disciplined

Able to follow systems and hit targets

Reliable and shows up consistently



 Tools You’ll Use

RingCentral (Auto Dialer)

Google Sheets (Tracking)

Google Calendar (Booking)



 Important

Must be available full-time

Must be able to commit to daily call targets (100+ calls/day)

This role requires focus, consistency, and accountability



 How to Apply

Please send:

A short voice recording introducing yourself

Your experience with cold calling or sales

Your availability (timezone + hours)



 Video Instructions (Optional but Recommended)

To stand out, you may include a short video introduction (1–2 minutes):

Introduce yourself

Share your experience with cold calling or sales

Explain your approach when speaking with prospects

Tell us why you’d be a great fit for this role

???? This helps us better understand your communication skills and confidence on calls.



 Bonus Points

Experience with marketing agencies

Experience booking appointments for service-based businesses

Familiar with CRMs or dialers

title: IT Migration Specialist (Google Workspace ? Microsoft 365)
description:
Full Project Role ? Ongoing Position Opportunity



About the Role

We are an Australian company looking for a skilled IT Migration Specialist to lead a full migration from Google Workspace to Microsoft 365.   We value clear thinking, strong communications and getting the job done properly.



This is a hands-on role — you will take ownership of the migration and deliver a clean, working system and work closely with the Business Manager to deliver the completed project.



This starts as a project, with strong potential for long-term, full-time work in systems, automation and AI.



Requirements

• High level of intelligence with excellent verbal and written English skills 

• Team-oriented with strong communication and knowledge-sharing ability 

• Proactive, accountable and results-driven 

• Two verifiable professional references, including contact names and phone numbers



Scope of Work (Project Phase)

You will be responsible for:

• Migrating:

o Gmail ? Outlook / Exchange Online

o Google Drive ? SharePoint & OneDrive

o Calendars, contacts, users

o Domains and DNS setup (MX, SPF, DKIM, etc.)

• Setting up a clean Microsoft 365 environment:

o SharePoint structure (libraries, permissions, access)

o Controlled use of OneDrive

• Ensuring:

o Secure setup

o Minimal downtime

o Smooth transition for users



Required Deliverables

• Migration plan (step-by-step, including cutover)

• System structure diagrams (SharePoint + user access)

• Clean and fully working Microsoft 365 setup

• Basic SOPs / user guides



Ongoing Role (If You Perform Well)

• CRM integration (GHL)

• System improvements and optimisation

• AI workflow implementation



Requirements (Strict)

• Proven experience with Google Workspace ? Microsoft 365 migration

• Strong SharePoint experience (structure + permissions)

• Solid understanding of:

o DNS and domain setup

o
 cutover and migration tools

• Excellent English (written and spoken)

• Can explain technical work clearly

• Works independently and delivers results



How to Apply (IMPORTANT – Follow Exactly)

To be considered, your application must include all of the below:

1. List 2–3 migration projects you have completed

o Include what you migrated and tools used

2. Answer this question (short response):

o What are the biggest risks when migrating from Google Workspace to Microsoft 365 and how do you handle them?

3. Your availability (hours per week + timezone)

4. Start your application with this line:

“M365 MIGRATION – READY”

(Applications without this will be ignored)



Important

• Do not send generic or copy-paste applications

• We are looking for someone who has real experience, not theory



Role Details

• Ongoing role available for the right person

• Remote work

• Must overlap with Australian business hours, between the hours of 7am to 5pm PHP 



Why This Role

If you are good, this becomes a long-term role working on:

• System design

• Automation

• AI integration

• Business process improvement



Please Note:  If your application is not completed as described in this position description your application will be ignored.

/SMS regulations and best practices

???? What We’re Looking For

 & SMS into major revenue channels

?? Strong Copy & Strategy Sense – You know how to create messaging that sells

Candidates must be able to manage multiple weekly campaigns and maintain/optimize core flows that generate consistent revenue



???? Why Join Skinnify?

title: AI Video Generator / Editor
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand looking to scale our short-form video advertising. We have identified a highly profitable ad format and need an AI Video Specialist to help us produce these at scale. We will provide and pay for all the necessary tools and software subscriptions you need to get the job done.



The Role:

We are looking for a creative powerhouse who can generate 3D animated, character-driven short-form ads (TikTok, Reels, Shorts). You will be creating personified 3D characters (e.g., talking vitamins, organs, or "villain" health issues) that explain symptoms and introduce our supplements as the ultimate solution.



What You Will Do:



AI Video Generation: Use Veo 3 (and other cutting-edge AI video models) to generate high-quality, consistent 3D character animations.



Hook Creation: Write and execute scroll-stopping visual and auditory hooks within the first 3 seconds of every video.



Voiceovers & Audio: Generate dynamic, emotionally engaging AI voiceovers that match the personality of the 3D characters (villains sounding sinister, hero products sounding heroic).



Video Assembly: Edit the generated clips, voiceovers, and captions together into fast-paced, high-retention 30 to 60-second ads.



Produce at Scale: Maintain a consistent output of high-quality videos each week without sacrificing the Direct Response marketing formula.



Requirements:



Proven experience using advanced AI video generation tools (specifically Veo 3 or similar state-of-the-art text-to-video/image-to-video models).



A strong portfolio of short-form content, preferably in the health, wellness, or supplement niche.



Deep understanding of Direct Response marketing, pacing, and what makes a video go viral on TikTok/Meta.



Ability to prompt AI effectively for consistent character design and movement.



Proficiency with AI voice generation tools (e.g., ElevenLabs) and basic video editing software (CapCut, Premiere, etc.).



Why Work With Us?



All Tools Provided: We cover all your software costs. You just bring the talent.



Clear Creative Direction: We know exactly what works; you won't be guessing.



Consistent Work: We are looking for a long-term partner to scale with us.



How to Apply:

Please send your portfolio showcasing at least two examples of 3D animated or AI-generated short-form videos you have created, along with a brief explanation of the tools you used to make them.

title: Digital Marketing Manager — Trades Business (Growth Role)
description:
THIS ROLE IS FOR SOMEONE WHO WANTS TO OWN SOMETHING — NOT JUST COMPLETE TASKS.



We are Elite Trades Australia. We are a Melbourne-based trades business with 15+ licensed plumbers, electricians, and HVAC technicians completing real jobs across Melbourne every day. Our core speciality is heat pump installations, split system installs, and government-backed VEU energy upgrade programs.



Right now, Melbourne doesn't know who we are. That is about to change.



We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager to build our brand from the ground up — and eventually own it completely. You will start by working closely with the business owner. Over time, as you prove yourself, this role becomes fully yours to run.



This is not a "post some content and clock out" job. We want someone who thinks, who problem-solves, who looks at our business and asks "what should we be doing that we're not?" If that's you, read on.



---



WHAT THIS ROLE COVERS



You will own our entire digital presence. That includes:



SOCIAL MEDIA

- Run Instagram and
 — strategy, content calendar, 

  posting, engagement, DMs, comments

- Create Reels and short-form video content from raw job footage 

  sent by our field team — before/afters, installs, team culture, 

  educational content about heat pumps and energy savings

- Think beyond just posting — study what is working in the 

  trades and home services space and bring those ideas to us



VIDEO EDITING

- Edit 4–6 short-form videos per week — fast-paced, 

  mobile-first, Reels format

- Add captions, music, motion graphics, and text overlays

- Repurpose long content into short clips across platforms

- Own the visual style of Elite Trades — we want a consistent, 

  professional look that makes us stand out from every other 

  tradie page in Melbourne



GOOGLE AND WEBSITE

- Manage and optimise our Google Business Profile — posts, 

  photos, Q&As, review responses, service updates

- Use Google tools (Search Console, Analytics, Trends) to 

  understand what people are searching for and report back to us

- Coordinate basic website updates — landing page copy, 

  service pages, SEO improvements — working with our web 

  developer or making minor edits yourself

- Monitor our online reputation across Google,
, 

  and any directory listings



REBRANDING ELITE TRADES

- Help us define what Elite Trades looks and sounds like online

- Develop a consistent visual identity — colour palette, 

  tone of voice, post templates, video style

- We want to look like a premium, trustworthy, professional 

  business — not a random tradie with a phone camera

- Bring ideas. We are open to them.



OTHER ADVERTISING AND CHANNELS

- Research and recommend platforms we are not using yet — 

  TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, Houzz, hipages, 

  Google Local Services, etc.

- Set up and manage directory listings (hipages, 

  ServiceSeeking, Oneflare, True Local, Houzz)

- Monitor and report on paid ad performance 

  (we run Google Ads — you track spend and results weekly)

- Look for opportunities we have not thought of yet. 

  Bring them to us.



TOOLS AND EFFICIENCY

- Use AI tools, scheduling platforms (Later, Buffer, or 

  similar), Canva, and any other tools that make you 

  faster and better

- We expect you to know your tools and use them — 

  do not wait to be told what software to use

- Research competitors, study their content, and tell us 

  what is working in the market

- Build systems for yourself so this role scales — 

  templates, content banks, caption libraries, 

  a repeatable weekly workflow



LEADS AND BUSINESS SUPPORT

- Send review requests to customers after completed jobs

- Respond to social media enquiries and DMs 

  (scripts provided, but you will improve them over time)

- Build contact lists of Melbourne property managers 

  and strata companies for B2B outreach

- Track all marketing activity in a simple weekly 

  report — what was posted, what performed, 

  what leads came in, what needs attention



---



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We are not looking for someone who needs to be told what to do every day.



We are looking for someone who:

- Is a strong video editor first — this skill is non-negotiable

- Understands social media as a business tool, not just content

- Is curious and self-directed — you Google things, 

  you test things, you figure things out

- Communicates clearly and proactively — 

  you update us before we have to ask

- Takes ownership — if something is not working, 

  you say so and suggest a fix

- Wants to grow — this role will expand as the 

  business grows, and so will your responsibilities and pay



You do NOT need to know the trades industry. We will teach you 

everything about our business. What we cannot teach is drive, 

creativity, and the ability to take ownership.



---



MUST HAVES



- Proven video editing portfolio — short-form, 

  Reels/TikTok format, captions, motion text

- Experience managing a real business social media account

- Strong written English

- Comfortable with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

- Available to overlap with AEST hours — 

  minimum 9am to 5pm Monday to Friday

- Fast internet connection and a reliable computer

- Self-starter — you do not need daily hand-holding



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- $950 AUD per month — full time, 40 hours per week

- Paid monthly

- Performance and pay review at 6 months — 

  this role pays more as you take on more

- Long-term permanent position — we are building 

  something and we want you to build it with us

- Direct access to the business owner — 

  no bureaucracy, fast decisions, real feedback

- A role that grows — the goal is for you to fully 

  own the marketing function of this business



---



HOW TO APPLY



We will receive many applications. Most will not be read 

because they do not follow instructions. Be different.



Send your application to 

Subject line: ELITE MARKETING — [Your Name]



Include ALL of the following. Missing any one item 

means your application will not be reviewed.



1. VIDEO INTRODUCTION (required)

   Film yourself speaking to camera for 60 to 90 seconds.

   Tell us: who you are, what you have done, what tools 

   you use, and what excites you about this role.

   Upload to Google Drive and send the link. No video = no response.



2. YOUR BEST VIDEO EDITING WORK (required)

   Send 2 to 3 examples of short-form video you have 

   personally edited. Reels, TikToks, or similar. 

   Show us your best. Links or files accepted.



3. A BUSINESS SOCIAL MEDIA ACCOUNT YOU HAVE MANAGED (required)

   Show us a real business page you ran. Send the handle 

   or screenshots. We want to see strategy, not just 

   pretty posts.



4. ANSWER THESE TWO QUESTIONS (required)

   Keep your answers honest and specific. 

   Do not write generic answers.



   Question 1:

   "Elite Trades Australia is a Melbourne plumbing, 

   electrical, and heat pump installation business. 

   We have no real brand presence right now. 

   If you were starting from scratch, what would 

   you do in the first 30 days and why?"



   Question 2:

   "What is one thing most trades businesses do wrong 

   on social media, and what would you do differently?"



We are serious about finding the right person. 

We are willing to wait for them.

If you are that person — apply now.

title: UI/UX Specialist / CSS Cleanup - Astro & Docker (Project-Based)
description:
I have an Astro website with a codebase that has become messy and bloated because of AI. I am looking for a developer who actually understands CSS and the cascading impact of "I'll just clean it up later" AI copy-paste code.



I say this as the one who copy-pasted code and got too busy to go back and clean up.



The Task:

Your first project is to refactor the Home Page CSS to make it consistent across mobile and desktop.

You will be given access to a Github repository where you can make pull requests.

- Experience with Astro components.

- Able to clean up global CSS without breaking existing layouts.
