Successful candidates will be moved on to a paid test task

title: IT Technical Support Engineer - Permanent WFH Remote, Flexible Hours (+10 GMT)
description:
*** DO NOT APPLY UNTIL YOU HAVE READ THIS AD IN FULL ***



Amigo Technology is an IT service business and Managed Service Provider (MSP), located on the Sunshine Coast, Australia. We have been operating for 16 years, with the goal of making computers and technology friendlier to our awesome small business clients. We are seeking a Technical IT service officer to join our friendly team via a permanent, work-from-home arrangement.



By joining the Amigo team, you will enjoy:



- A flexible work from home position, up to 40 hours per week, on a schedule that works for you

- Unlimited access to our internal virtual lab, mentoring and training programs, where you will get to experience the latest and greatest technologies with a strong emphasis on open source systems

- Plenty of hands-on time with workstations, servers, networking and cybersecurity projects

- A friendly team atmosphere where you’ll need a good sense of humour!

- Daily opportunities to help ordinary people with technology challenges in a team environment, with the goal of making technology friendly

- Competitive earnings, typically between 370php and 475php per hour, depending on ability and experience, plus bonuses



Ready to join? Here’s what you’ll need:



- A keen interest in working with and growing your skill sets through a wide variety of modern computing technologies (both Windows and Linux - bonus points if you have a home lab!)

- A high level of attention to detail (you must put the word "AMIGO" in the “Additional Comments” section of our application form to be considered)

- At least two years of experience working in an IT service position, ideally in an MSP that works with Windows 11, Microsoft 365 OR Google Workspace environments



This position will have many opportunities for growth, and over time you will have to encourage you to work with a wider range of technologies and platforms. Prior experience with the following would be greatly appreciated and will lead to greater earnings, although this is not a requirement:



- Debian-based Linux (eg. Linux Mint 22 / Ubuntu 24.04 or newer)

- Apple MacOS 13+

- Proxmox 8+ & Docker (or other hypervisor / virtualisation platforms)

- Small business networking and storage systems (eg. Opnsense, OpenWrt, Cockpit), including configuring Wi-Fi, DHCP, QOS, VLANs, VPNs, Samba, ZFS RAID, etc

- FreePBX 16+ / Asterisk, IP Phones & SIP



Your duties will include the following:



- Processing technical support requests, enquiries and system alerts

- Providing remote IT services via RMM & IP KVMs

- Assisting with new and existing IT systems, including setting up, migrating, monitoring, documenting and securing technical systems, such as workstations, servers and cloud-based infrastructure



If you have made it this far, great! Before you apply:



- You will be expected to learn quickly and contribute as part of a team. The workload will be both challenging and rewarding.

- We conduct background checks and our team is required to use managed remote workstations. Dishonest conduct will be quickly caught. If you’re thinking of using a mouse jiggler or being OE, please don’t apply.

- Applicants MUST submit their application via our application form, which can be found on the Amigo Technology Sunshine Coast website via the Careers section in the top menu. All other application methods will be IGNORED. 
/form-technical-officer-application



Please double check the responses to your resume to ensure they are correct - over 90% of applicants fail to submit their application with correct answers. We will only contact valid submissions. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Us

LP Bonds. Live DeFi protocol. 8+ chains. 50+ pools. Real users. Real TVL. We built this with a team most startups would call "impossible." We're not looking for someone who's done 10 years of safe corporate blockchain work. We're looking for someone who's hungry enough to own an entire protocol's technical stack and sharp enough to not break it.



THE ROLE

 You own everything technical. Smart contracts. Frontend. Backend. New chain deployments. DEX integrations. Infrastructure. There's no senior engineer above you to review your code. There's no architect drawing diagrams for you. You are the engineering department.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Solidity & Contracts:

- Deploy and manage production smart contracts across EVM chains - Bond NFTs, LP vaults, yield engines, upgrade systems, marketplace

- Ship new chain deployments end-to-end. We hand you a chain, you hand us live contracts.

- Integrate with DEX protocols (Camelot, PancakeSwap, Uniswap) at the contract level

- Security is your religion. You think about how things break before you think about how they work.



Frontend:

- React/Next.js - build and maintain the full user-facing application

- Web3 wallet integrations, stats dashboard, Bond NFT marketplace

- If the UI is broken, it's your problem. If it's slow, it's your problem.



Backend & Infra:

- Node.js API, MongoDB, IPFS

- Multi-chain indexing and event monitoring

- Keep 8+ chain deployments healthy simultaneously



WHO YOU ARE:

- You've written Solidity that's been deployed to mainnet. Even once. Even small. You've felt the weight of real money in your contract.

- You can build a full-stack app alone. Not "I contributed to a team project" - you built it.

- You learn by doing, not by asking. You hit a wall, you Google it, you read the docs, you figure it out, you ship.

- You're not waiting for permission. You see something broken, you fix it. You see something missing, you build it.

- You're young, hungry, and slightly terrified of how much responsibility this is. Good. That fear keeps you sharp.





WE CARE ABOUT:

- What you've shipped. Show us. Links or it didn't happen.

- How fast you learn when thrown into something you've never done

- Whether you take ownership or make excuses

- Whether you stay up until 3am because the bug is bothering you, not because someone told you to



This is a small team building something most of DeFi hasn't figured out yet. You will be stretched. You will ship things you didn't think you could ship. You will learn more here than anywhere else because there's no one to hide behind.



If that excites you, apply. If it scares you, even better - apply anyway.

title: Health Insurance Data and Contracting Support
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing health insurance agency dedicated to helping individuals and families across the United States find the right health coverage. Our team operates in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where every tea
mber plays a vital role in delivering exceptional service. We are expanding and looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to join our team and grow with us.

WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive hourly pay of $3–$7/hour based on experience, plus commission opportunities.

A clear path for growth — top performers will have opportunities for increased pay, expanded responsibilities, and leadership roles.

Fully remote position — work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection.

A supportive, team-oriented culture where your contributions are valued and recognized.

Hands-on training and exposure to the U.S. health insurance industry, building valuable long-term skills.

POSITION OVERVIEW

We are seeking a detail-oriented Data & Contracting Specialist to manage the backbone operations of our agency. This role is critical to keeping our agent contracting, data fulfillment, invoicing, and administrative systems running smoothly. You will support the agency’s key players by handling essential back-office functions that directly impact growth and profitability.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage the full agent contracting lifecycle: process new agent appointments, carrier applications, certifications, and onboarding documentation.

Track and maintain contracting status for all agents across multiple carriers, ensuring timely renewals, compliance, and up-to-date records.

Execute data fulfillment processes including lead data management, list preparation, data segmentation, and delivery to marketing partners.

Manage invoicing for the team and coordinate billing with the agency’s data and marketing company partners.

Maintain and update agency databases, spreadsheets, and CRM records with accuracy and consistency.

Provide administrative support to agency leadership, including scheduling, document preparation, and task management.

Prepare reports on contracting pipeline, data delivery metrics, and financial summaries as requested.

Coordinate with carriers, marketing vendors, and internal tea
mbers to resolve data discrepancies and contracting issues.

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills — you thrive on accuracy and process management.

Strong computer proficiency including advanced skills in spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets), CRM platforms, and data management tools.

Experience with invoicing, billing, or basic bookkeeping processes.

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in an administrative, data entry, or operations support role.

Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines independently with minimal supervision.

Strong written communication skills for professional correspondence with carriers, vendors, and tea
mbers.

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free workspace.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Previous experience in health insurance agent contracting or insurance agency operations.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms.

Experience working with carrier contracting portals and appointment systems.

Background in data fulfillment, lead management, or marketing operations.

Experience with invoicing tools such as QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or similar platforms.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume along with a brief cover message explaining why you are the right fit for this role. Please include:

• Your relevant experience  • Your availability and time zone  • Your internet speed test results

title: Appointment Setter
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing health insurance agency dedicated to helping individuals and families across the United States find the right health coverage. Our team operates in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where every tea
mber plays a vital role in delivering exceptional service. We are expanding and looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to join our team and grow with us.

WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive hourly pay of $3–$7/hour based on experience, plus commission opportunities.

A clear path for growth — top performers will have opportunities for increased pay, expanded responsibilities, and leadership roles.

Fully remote position — work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection.

A supportive, team-oriented culture where your contributions are valued and recognized.

Hands-on training and exposure to the U.S. health insurance industry, building valuable long-term skills.

POSITION OVERVIEW

We are looking for an energetic and driven Outbound Prospector to power our lead generation and appointment-setting engine. You will manage outbound text message campaigns and phone outreach using our automated software systems, engaging potential clients and booking qualified appointments for our sales agents. This is a high-activity, results-driven role ideal for someone who thrives on volume, speed, and hitting targets.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Operate and manage outbound text messaging campaigns through GoHighLevel (GHL) and related automation tools to engage prospects at scale.

Conduct outbound phone calls to prospective clients, introducing our health insurance services and qualifying interest.

Set qualified appointments for licensed sales agents by following established scripts and qualification criteria.

Monitor and respond to inbound text replies and campaign responses promptly to maximize conversion rates.

Maintain organized records of all prospect interactions, appointment outcomes, and follow-up tasks in the CRM.

Collaborate with the sales team to refine messaging, scripts, and targeting strategies based on performance data.

Meet or exceed daily and weekly targets for outbound activity (calls, texts, and appointments set).

Manage and clean prospect lists, flag bad data, and ensure campaign compliance with TCPA and messaging regulations.

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Strong computer skills with the ability to manage multiple software tools, browser tabs, and workflows simultaneously.

Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls and engaging prospects in a professional and persuasive manner.

Excellent written communication skills — must be able to craft clear, concise, and engaging text messages.

Self-motivated with a strong work ethic and a results-oriented mindset.

title: Health Insurance Customer Support Specialist
description:
NOW HIRING

Client Support Specialist

Health Insurance Agency  |  Remote  |  Full-Time VA  |  $4–$8/hr + Commission opportunities





ABOUT US

We are a growing health insurance agency dedicated to helping individuals and families across the United States find the right health coverage. Our team operates in a fast-paced, remote-first environment where every tea
mber plays a vital role in delivering exceptional service. We are expanding and looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to join our team and grow with us.

WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive hourly pay of $4–$8/hour based on experience, plus commission opportunities.

A clear path for growth — top performers will have opportunities for increased pay, expanded responsibilities, and leadership roles.

Fully remote position — work from anywhere with a reliable internet connection.

A supportive, team-oriented culture where your contributions are valued and recognized.

Hands-on training and exposure to the U.S. health insurance industry, building valuable long-term skills.



POSITION OVERVIEW

We are looking for a highly skilled Client Support Specialist to serve as the primary point of contact for our clients after the sale is made. You will be the face and voice of the agency, guiding policyholders through their health insurance benefits, resolving issues, and ensuring an exceptional client experience. This role requires outstanding English communication skills, a professional phone presence, and the ability to navigate the complex U.S. health insurance landscape with confidence.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Serve as the main point of contact for all post-sale client inquiries via phone,
, and messaging platforms.

Guide clients through their health insurance plans, including coverage details, claims processes, provider networks, and benefit explanations.

Assist clients with enrollment changes, plan modifications, qualifying life events, and annual renewal support.

Troubleshoot and resolve billing discrepancies, claims issues, and coverage questions by coordinating with carriers and internal tea
mbers.

Maintain detailed and accurate records of all client interactions in the agency CRM (GoHighLevel/GHL).

Proactively follow up with clients to ensure satisfaction, policy understanding, and retention.

Escalate complex cases to senior tea
mbers or carriers as needed while keeping clients informed throughout the process.

Stay current on health insurance regulations, ACA guidelines, carrier updates, and plan changes that may impact clients.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Impeccable spoken and written English — must sound natural, professional, and confident on live calls with U.S.-based clients.

Strong understanding of the U.S. health insurance industry, including ACA/Marketplace plans, Medicare, Medicaid, short-term health, and ancillary products.

Exceptional computer skills with the ability to quickly learn and navigate multiple software platforms simultaneously.

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in a client-facing support role, preferably in the insurance or healthcare industry.

Outstanding problem-solving skills with the ability to handle difficult client situations with professionalism and empathy.

Reliable high-speed internet connection, a quiet workspace, and professional-quality headset for calls.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Previous experience working in a U.S. health insurance agency or brokerage.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms.

Experience with carrier portals such as 
, SHOP, or direct carrier enrollment systems.

Licensed or willing to pursue health insurance licensing (state-specific).



HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume along with a brief cover message explaining why you are the right fit for this role. Please include:

• Your relevant experience  • Your availability and time zone  • Your internet speed test results





We are an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all tea
mbers.

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Social Media Marketer (Online Jazz Education)
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality

Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool

Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more

Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently

Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)

Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers

Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales

Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins

Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why

Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder

Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales

Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder

Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule

Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and

Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads

Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates

Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:



-Experience with content repurposing workflows — turning long-form content (video, podcast, blog) into social-native formats



-Background in
 marketing or digital funnels (understanding the broader customer journey matters here)



-Genuine enthusiasm for or knowledge of music — especially jazz or music education. Our audience is adult musicians, and understanding how they think, what they struggle with, and the language they use will make everything you do more effective



Compensation & Structure:



Type: Full-time, remote



Salary: $1,500/month (1,075,905 PHP/year)



13th Month Pay: paid out in December



End of year performance bonuses: paid out in December if applicable



Reports to: Founder



Support: You'll have access to a video editor for repurposing existing content, Founder guidance, and support from other tea
mbers when needed.



TO APPLY FILL OUT THIS SHORT APPLICATION:



(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION)

title: Video Editor | Italian YouTube Channels | Business & Finance
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and creative Video Editor to join our team. We are two brothers based in Italy, running three companies in the renewable energy sector. We are launching two distinct YouTube channels focusing on business, AI, finance, and leadership. We are building this from the ground up and want someone to grow with us long term. 





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Edit all five content types (mini-documentaries, talking-head videos, mini-series, interviews, and shorts) following provided scripts and style briefs

- Replicate and maintain the visual style of reference channels across both channels

- Create motion graphics, kinetic typography, animated data visualizations, and lower thirds

- Manage the full post-production workflow: rough cut, color grading, sound design, and final export

- Build reusable templates for each content type to ensure consistency at scale

- Advise on equipment setup and technical specifications to meet target production quality





WHAT THE WORK LOOKS LIKE:



1. Practical Business Guides (10-15 min, 1 per week (pillar content)): Dynamic talking head videos with kinetic typography. (Style: Ali Abdaal, Starting Finance, Marcello Ascani).

2. Mini-Documentaries (12-20 min, 1-2 per month): Deep-dive videos with research, data, animations, and B-roll. (Style: Starting Finance, MRNBD).

3. Mini-series / experiments (10-15 min, series of 3-5 episodes): Documenting a project from inception to completion. (Style: MRNBD).

4. Interview / Podcast (30-60 min, TBD): Interviews with entrepreneurs, experts, and interesting people from our network. (Style: Chapeau).

5.  Short-form Content (30-60 sec, as needed): Shorts Reacting to breaking news in business, energy, and AI for trending news.



NOTE: The primary language is Italian, so you do not need to speak it, but you must be comfortable editing content you cannot understand





VISUAL STYLE REFERENCE:



Primary:

-  Starting Finance: 

- MRNBD: 

- Pietro Michelangeli: 

Secondary:

- Ali Abdaal: 

- Marcello Ascani: 

- Chapeau: 

Editing Style Sample:

- How I Made $3M+ Using Instagram DMs (Dan Martell): 





QUALIFICATIONS:



- Proven experience editing for YouTube channels

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Demonstrated ability to create motion graphics and kinetic typography

- Ability to match and maintain a defined visual style from reference channels

- Experience with data-driven animations, lower thirds, and organizational diagrams

- Comfortable editing non-English footage

- English proficiency required for communication, scripts, and AI-dubbed versions





BONUS POINTS:



- STEM Education: A background in Science, Tech, Engineering, or Math is a massive advantage as you will be dealing with technical business and AI topics.

- YouTube Experience: Proven experience editing for channels with 100k+ subscribers





SCHEDULE AND COMPENSATION:



- ~$3 per hour

Note: Rate is negotiable based on portfolio quality and experience. Please include your rate expectation in your application.

- Standard hours: 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM CET/CEST (approx. 3:00 PM/4:00 PM to 12:00 AM/1:00 AM PHT)

- 20-30 hours per week

- Time-tracking software to log all hours

- Weekly payments

- Opportunity to move to full-time as the channels scale.





HOW TO APPLY:



To confirm you have read this posting, begin your application with the phrase: "YOUTUBE VIDEO EDITOR". Applications without this phrase will not be reviewed.



Include the following:



1. A portfolio with at least three relevant edits, including at least one example of motion graphics or data animation you built

2. Your rate expectation

3. Updated CV

4.

5. Contact Number (WhatsApp)

title: DM Appointment Setter
description:
We run a fast-growing results-driven online fitness coaching company helping busy Asian men lose stubborn belly fat, build lean muscle, and stay in shape without cutting out the cultural foods they love.



Our brand and client base is growing fast and we have TOO MANY leads to handle. As a result, we are rapidly expanding our team and looking for a high-performance DM setter who knows how to turn conversations into booked calls so we can help even more people!



If you thrive in a results-driven environment and want uncapped earning potential, keep reading.



Compensation:



- Full-time: 40–50 hours per week

- Pay: $650 USD per month

- Commission: 3-5% of cash collected from every client you book who enrolls

- Expected Earnings: $800–$1,200+ per month



**Top performers earn significantly more. This is a performance-based role. Your income scales with your output.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



- Initiating conversations with new followers, story viewers, and engaged prospects

- Reaching out to warm and targeted outbound leads daily

- Using our scripts + frameworks while making conversations feel natural and human

- Asking intelligent qualifying questions

- Moving qualified prospects into booked sales calls

- Following up consistently with warm leads

- Tracking conversations and outcomes inside our CRM

- Maintaining our brand voice and communication standards

- You will be expected to generate volume while maintaining quality.



What We’re Looking For:



- Strong written English (clear, natural, professional — no grammar mistakes)

- Quick response speed and ability to handle multiple conversations at once

- 1–3+ years of experience as a DM setter (fitness industry preferred)

- Proven history of booking qualified calls that actually show up

- Reliable laptop + fast internet

- Comfortable sending 80–100+ high-quality messages per day

- Willing to work flexible hours, including weekends when needed

- Highly coachable and able to take feedback fast

- Competitive, disciplined, and motivated by performance

- We move quickly. You must be comfortable keeping up.



Why This Is a Big Opportunity:



- Work directly with a rapidly scaling online fitness coaching company with a passion for client results and excellence across the board

- Clear SOPs, scripts, and leadership support

- Real growth path for top performers (raises + leadership opportunities)

- Paid onboarding and training

- Remote position

- Be part of a team with high standards and long-term vision

- We value excellence, accountability, and growth.



How To Apply:

Looking forward to speaking with you!

title: Claude AI Specialist — Part-Time Ongoing
description:
Ongoing part-time role maintaining and improving our Claude AI setup (Cowork, skills, scheduled tasks, MCP). Looking for a tidy, technical specialist with strong English.



ABOUT US



Tama Group is a property development and tenant advisory business. We're based in Indonesia but operate in English. The founder uses Claude (Anthropic's AI system) as the engine behind a lot of daily work — drafting, research, workflow automation, document review, meeting prep.



Over the past several months we've built out a substantial Claude setup: Cowork workspace, custom skills, scheduled tasks, MCP connectors, and a memory system. It's powerful, but it's getting messy. Skills overlap, automations accumulate, memory gets stale, and nobody owns the hygiene.



That's the role.



THE ROLE



You'll be the person who keeps our Claude operating system clean, well-documented, and continuously improving. This is NOT a one-off build project — it's an ongoing relationship. We're looking for someone who thinks in systems, documents their work, and is allergic to sprawl.



Typical monthly work includes:



1. MAINTENANCE (ongoing)

   - Audit what's running — scheduled tasks, skills, connectors, memory files

   - Prune anything stale, redundant, or broken

   - Keep naming conventions and documentation consistent

   - Maintain a change log so we always know what's changed and why



2. IMPROVEMENT (as needs emerge)

   - Build new skills and automations for specific workflows (tenant communications, deal review, market monitoring, meeting prep, etc.)

   - Improve existing automations based on how they're actually used

   - Set up new MCP connectors as we add tools



3. STEWARDSHIP (continuous)

   - Stay current with Claude's capabilities and flag new features worth adopting

   - Recommend small improvements proactively

   - Respond to questions about our setup when asked



REQUIREMENTS — MUST HAVE



- Hands-on experience with Claude specifically. Not "ChatGPT and AI in general" — Claude. You should know what Cowork, skills, MCP servers, the Agent SDK, and scheduled tasks are, and ideally have built with them. If you have strong AI automation fundamentals and are new to some of these specific Claude features, tell us — we're open to the right person who learns fast.

- Strong written English — clear, concise, professional. You'll be documenting systems and writing briefs.

- Organized, systematic way of working. You keep your own work tidy.

- Ability to explain technical work in plain language.

- At least one example of a Claude or AI automation setup you've built and then maintained over time (not just a one-off demo).



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with Python or JavaScript (for custom MCP servers and more complex skills)

- Familiarity with n8n, Make, or Zapier

- Background in ops, IT, or technical support roles

- Interest in property / real estate / small business operations



WORKING ARRANGEMENT



- Part-time, starting at approximately 15 hours per week. Rate is $15–$20/hr depending on experience.

- Async-first. Weekly check-in via chat or video.

- Timezone flexible — we're in Indonesia (WIB/UTC+7).

- Paid monthly via OnlineJobs.ph's standard methods.

- 30-day trial period, then open-ended ongoing.



TO APPLY



Please reply with the following, in this order:



1. The word "PRISTINE" at the top of your message (so I know you read the post).

2. 3–5 sentences on your Claude experience. One specific example of a setup or automation you built AND maintained over time. Links or screenshots welcome.

3. How you typically structure an ongoing retainer role — weekly rhythm, how you document work, how you keep a client informed.

4. Your proposed monthly rate and hours.

5. A short note on why this role appeals to you specifically.



I read every application carefully. Generic or templated applications will be ignored.



Thanks for reading — looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Video Editor Part-Time
description:
***PLEASE NOTE: There is a hidden test below, so please read the detailed application instructions***



I am looking for an honest, hardworking, self-motivated Content Production Virtual Assistant who can work independently and grow with me long-term.



This will start as a part-time role (approximately 10–20 hours per week), with the strong intention of becoming a full-time, permanent position for the right person.



This is NOT just a “video editor” role.



Your main responsibility will be to help turn raw audio, video, and ideas into polished, usable content across multiple businesses, including:

• A kitchen remodeling company (primary revenue driver)

• A flooring showroom brand (growth phase)

• An AI automation agency (high upside)

• A real estate / investing education brand (long-term brand)



???? YOUR CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Audio Editing (Simple but VERY Important)

• Trim raw audio recordings (remove mistakes, long pauses, filler)

• Follow verbal cues (e.g. double clap, “cut that”)

• Normalize audio levels

• Light cleanup (background noise, clicks, etc.)

• Export clean, ready-to-use voiceovers



2. Video Editing (Template-Based, Not Overly Creative)

• Create long-form videos (YouTube-style, faceless or voiceover-based)

• Create short-form videos (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

• Add:

  • Subtitles / captions

  • Basic B-roll stock footage

  • Simple zoom cuts and jump cuts

  • Follow clear templates and brand style (we will provide examples)



3. Content Repurposing (VERY High Value)

• From one long video, you should be able to:

• Create 3–5 short clips

• Identify “hook-worthy” 
nts

• Add captions and simple on-screen text

• Format for multiple platforms



4. Course Content Production (Under Team Guidance)

• Assist in assembling online video courses

• Sync audio with slides or visuals

• Organize lessons into modules

• Upload and format content inside our platforms

• Work closely with our team lead (Dexie), who will guide you



5. Marketing Content Support (Priority Focus)

• You will help produce content for:

• Primary Priority:

  • Kitchen & Bath Remodeling (lead generation, before/after, demos)



• Secondary Priority:

  • Flooring Brand (product showcases, educational content)



• Tertiary Priority:

  • AI Agency (demo videos, SMS/emulator-style content)



• Fourth Priority:

  • Real Estate Education Brand (YouTube + course content)



6. Organization & File Management

• Organize files in Google Drive and/or Dropbox (VERY important)

• Maintain clean naming conventions

• Track content status (raw ? edited ? published)



????? TOOLS (Preferred, not mandatory)

• Video: Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar

• Audio: Audacity or Adobe Podcast



Optional: Descript (bonus)

• IDEALLY, you use Adobe Premiere Pro, because many of our existing project files are there



???? BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT A BIG PLUS)

• Graphic design (thumbnails, social posts)

• Motion graphics

• Explainer video animations

• Basic storytelling/editing instincts



???? COMPENSATION

• Compensation is a combination of base hourly rate plus performance bonus.

• Your performance will be evaluated based upon:

• Speed, accuracy, and quality of completed tasks

• Productivity

• Communication responsiveness (how quickly you reply)

• Ability to follow instructions and improve over time



YOUR IDEAL ATTITUDE

• You are hard-working, honest, loyal, and trustworthy

• You take initiative and do not need constant supervision

• You are detail-oriented and take pride in clean, organized work

• You are coachable and open to feedback

• You are dependable and follow through on commitments

• You genuinely want to grow with a long-term team



???? IMPORTANT: APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)

Work hours are 9:00 am to 1:00 pm EDT/EST (New York/Florida), that’s 10:00 pm to 2:00 am Philippine Standard Time.

As your first test, please include the words “purple cow” at the very beginning of your application, so that I know you have read this job post in full.



???? REQUIRED: PERSONALIZED VIDEO OR AUDIO

Please also include a brief personalized recording (VERY IMPORTANT):

You may use:

• Loom (free), OR

• Vocaroo (free)



In your recording (2–4 minutes), please answer:

1. Does the compensation fit your goals?

2. Your experience with video and/or audio editing

3. What tools you currently use

4. Your internet speed and computer specs

5. Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role

6. Any additional skills (design, animation, etc.)



This step is REQUIRED. Applications without this will be ignored.



???? FINAL TEST TASK (SHORTLISTED APPLICANTS ONLY)

If shortlisted, you will be given a paid test task:

You will receive:

• A short raw audio clip (with mistakes and pauses)

• A simple instruction brief



Your task:

• Clean and trim the audio



Create:

• 1 short-form video clip (30–60 seconds)

• 1 simple long-form video (2–5 minutes)

• Add captions and basic visuals



This helps us evaluate your:

• Attention to detail

• Editing quality

• Ability to follow instructions



If you’re just looking for a quick freelance gig, this is NOT for you.



If you’re looking for a long-term opportunity where you can grow your skills and become a key part of a content-driven business, then apply.

 • Subtitles / captions

 • Basic B-roll stock footage

 • Simple zoom cuts and jump cuts

 • Follow clear templates and brand style (we will provide examples)



3. Content Repurposing (VERY High Value)

• From one long video, you should be able to:

• Create 3–5 short clips

• Identify “hook-worthy” 
nts

• Add captions and simple on-screen text

• Format for multiple platforms



4. Course Content Production (Under Team Guidance)

• Assist in assembling online video courses

• Sync audio with slides or visuals

• Organize lessons into modules

• Upload and format content inside our platforms

• Work closely with our team lead (Dexie), who will guide you



5. Marketing Content Support (Priority Focus)

• You will help produce content for:



Primary Priority:

 • Kitchen & Bath Remodeling (lead generation, before/after, demos)



Secondary Priority:

 • Flooring Brand (product showcases, educational content)



Tertiary Priority:

 • AI Agency (demo videos, SMS/emulator-style content)



Fourth Priority:

 • Real Estate Education Brand (YouTube + course content)



6. Organization & File Management

• Organize files in Google Drive and/or Dropbox (VERY important)

• Maintain clean naming conventions

• Track content status (raw ? edited ? published)



TOOLS (Preferred, not mandatory)

• Video: Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar

• Audio: Audacity or Adobe Podcast



Optional: Descript (bonus)

• IDEALLY, you use Adobe Premiere Pro, because many of our existing project files are there



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT A BIG PLUS)

• Graphic design (thumbnails, social posts)

• Motion graphics

• Explainer video animations

• Basic storytelling/editing instincts



COMPENSATION

• Compensation is a combination of base hourly rate plus performance bonus.

• Your performance will be evaluated based upon:

• Speed, accuracy, and quality of completed tasks

• Productivity

• Communication responsiveness (how quickly you reply)

• Ability to follow instructions and improve over time



YOUR IDEAL ATTITUDE

• You are hard-working, honest, loyal, and trustworthy

• You take initiative and do not need constant supervision

• You are detail-oriented and take pride in clean, organized work

• You are coachable and open to feedback

• You are dependable and follow through on commitments

• You genuinely want to grow with a long-term team



IMPORTANT: APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)

Work hours are 9:00 am to 1:00 pm EDT/EST (New York/Florida), that’s 10:00 pm to 2:00 am Philippine Standard Time.

As your first test, please include the words “purple cow” at the very beginning of your application, so that I know you have read this job post in full.



REQUIRED: PERSONALIZED VIDEO OR AUDIO

Please also include a brief personalized recording (VERY IMPORTANT):

You may use:

• Loom (free), OR

• Vocaroo (free)



In your recording (2–4 minutes), please answer:

1. Does the compensation fit your goals?

2. Your experience with video and/or audio editing

3. What tools you currently use

4. Your internet speed and computer specs

5. Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role

6. Any additional skills (design, animation, etc.)



This step is REQUIRED. Applications without this will be ignored.



FINAL TEST TASK (SHORTLISTED APPLICANTS ONLY)

If shortlisted, you will be given a paid test task:



You will receive:

• A short raw audio clip (with mistakes and pauses)

• A simple instruction brief



Your task:

• Clean and trim the audio



Create:

• 1 short-form video clip (30–60 seconds)

• 1 simple long-form video (10 to 14 minutes)

• Add captions and basic visuals



This helps us evaluate your:

• Attention to detail

• Editing quality

• Ability to follow instructions



If you’re just looking for a quick freelance gig, this is NOT for you.



If you’re looking for a long-term opportunity where you can grow your skills and become a key part of a content-driven business, then apply.

title: Remote Sales Manager
description:
Remote Sales Manager



Position Title: Inside Sales Manager

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m. (US Eastern Time)

Pay: depending on your experience and qualifications.



About the Role

We are seeking a high-energy, growth-driven Inside Sales Manager to lead and scale our outbound and inbound sales teams in the Philippines. This role is pivotal to our 10X growth strategy and will be responsible for recruiting, training, scripting, and continuously developing a high-performing remote and onsite sales force.



Key Responsibilities

• Build and manage two distinct departments: Outbound and Inbound Sales.

• Recruit, onboard, and train remote and onsite sales reps.

• Develop and refine sales scripts, objection handling, and closing techniques.

• Implement ongoing training programs and performance coaching.

• Set, track, and achieve clear performance metrics (KPIs) for teams and individuals, create dashboards/reports and drive data-backed improvements.

• Monitor pipeline health, conversion rates, AHT, contact rates, and revenue per rep.

• Collaborate with leadership to align sales strategy with company growth goals.

• Foster a culture of accountability, energy, and excellence.



Qualifications

• 5–10 years of experience in inside sales leadership, preferably in BPO or high-volume environments.

• Proven track record of scaling teams and delivering revenue growth.

• Strong understanding of remote team dynamics and call center operations.

• Excellent communication, coaching, and analytical skills.

• Experience with CRM systems (preferably Infor CRM/Saleslogix) and sales-enablement tools.

• Hands-on experience creating KPI frameworks, setting targets, and managing to those metrics.



Preferred Traits

• Energetic and motivational leadership style.

• Strategic thinker with a hands-on approach.

• Familiarity with the Philippine market and workforce culture.

title: Mechanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer
description:
Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer



Job Description



A US-based manufacturing company is looking for a qualified Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer  to join our team. We are a recognized leader in the design and manufacture of ergonomic, interactive technical products for various industries.



Our customers include medical/healthcare, public safety/mission control, all government agencies, IT, and cleanroom ergonomic products.



Required Professional Skills:

Produce accurate 2D and 3D shop drawings to adequately show and dimension all machined sheet metal welded, assembly parts, part numbers, specifications for bends, welding, assembly, etc.

Develop and maintain bill of materials and manufacturing documents.

Produce drawings using AutoCAD 3D and Autodesk Inventor software

Drafting and design responsibilities would include incorporating modifications into existing designs, developing component models and scaling fabrication drawings from initial concept.

Evaluate existing designs and processes and provide recommendations for improving productivity and increasing efficiency throughout.

Work with managers to solve problems and offer ideas for improving processes



Requirements:

Must be proficient with AutoCAD 3D and Autodesk Inventor (2007+) software

This individual must be self-motivated and able to perform routine duties with some supervision.

Experience in sheet metal fabrication and machine shop environment is preferred

Experience in metal casting and plastic molding is an advantage.

Follow verbal and written instructions



Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D are required.



Schedule: Monday to Friday, from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. US EST, with a one-hour lunch break



NOTE: Please read!!!

Please send a link to your resume in PDF or Word format and your Teams account. Please submit your application if you are proficient in Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D.

 Ads) when needed

mbers have daily tasks and are meeting objectives

title: Senior Developer — Part-Time Code Reviewer & Architecture Advisor
description:
Rate: $10–13/hr (starting), with raise to $15/hr at 90 days based on performance

  Hours: 10 hrs/week (~43 hrs/month), mostly async with 1-hour weekly sync call

  Company: Pharmacy Pearls LLC — US-based pharmacy education company. We run a live LMS serving hundreds of pharmacists preparing for board exams (BCEMP, BCCCP, BCPS), an AI-powered

  medical research platform, and an AI podcast pipeline.



  ---



 Why this role exists

  We have two excellent full-stack developers who ship production features with Claude Code every day. They do great work — but no one is critically reviewing their code. We need a

  senior developer who will block bad PRs, catch architectural mistakes, and mentor the team. This is NOT a feature-coding role. You will review their work, propose architectural

  improvements, and make sure our platform doesn't collect tech debt or security holes.



  Think of it as the role a staff engineer or tech lead plays — but focused on review and advisory, not building.



  ---

  What you'll do (10 hrs/week)



  - Review 4–8 pull requests per week with actual line-level comments (not "LGTM")

  - Block PRs that aren't ready — enforce testing, security, and code-quality standards

  - 1-hour weekly sync call with the founder + 2 developers (Manila morning, your 8–10 AM)

  - Async architecture input on design docs before devs start coding

  - Monthly 1-page codebase health report (tech debt, risks, recommendations)

  - Answer ad-hoc async questions about security, DB design, auth patterns



  What you will NOT do



  - Write feature code (our devs handle that)

  - Own delivery timelines or sprint planning

  - Handle client communication or support



  ---

  Required skills



  - 8+ years full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript

  - React / Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL (production experience, not tutorials)

  - Daily Claude Code user — you must use Claude Code yourself. We'll ask to see your setup.

  - Code review experience — you have reviewed other developers' PRs and left line-level comments

  - Written English at C1/C2 level — your review comments must be clear and professional

  - Willingness to push back respectfully — if the founder proposes something bad, you say so



  Strongly preferred



  - AI/LLM integration experience (Claude API, RAG pipelines, vector databases)

  - Drizzle or Prisma ORM

  - Supabase, pgvector

  - Observability tools (BetterStack, Sentry, Datadog)

  - Testing discipline (Vitest, Jest, integration tests with real DBs)

  - Security mindset (OWASP familiarity, auth/session patterns)



  ---

  Our stack



  TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM, Supabase, pgvector, Tailwind CSS, BetterStack, Stripe, ClickUp, WordPress (legacy), Claude API, Voyage AI, OpenAI,

  Cartesia TTS



  ---

  How to apply



  To be considered, include ALL of the following in your application. Applications missing any item will be skipped.



  1. Your Claude Code workflow — screenshot of your CLAUDE.md file or a ~/.claude/ directory listing. When do you use Opus vs Sonnet vs Haiku? What slash commands or skills have you

  created?

  2. A link to one pull request you reviewed where you left at least 5 line-level comments that were not just approvals. If the repo is private, share a redacted screenshot.

  3. Answer this in 200 words or less:

  "A junior developer on the team opens a 170-file pull request that mixes three unrelated features — a dashboard, a notification system, and a database migration. All tests pass. The

  founder wants it shipped this week. What do you do?"

  4. Your rate preference between $10/hr and $14/hr, and why you'd accept a part-time retainer vs. a full-time gig.

  5. Years of React/Node/TypeScript/PostgreSQL experience — specific numbers per stack.



  ---

  Red flags that will get your application skipped



  - Generic "I am hardworking and detail-oriented" cover letters

  - No Claude Code evidence

  - "LGTM" as your concept of a real code review

  - Inflated experience claims (listing "5 years React" with a LinkedIn showing you started it last year)

  - Asking to write feature code "to help"



  ---

  What to expect if shortlisted



  - 30-minute video interview (we will ask you to share your screen and show Claude Code in action)

  - Paid 1-hour code review trial ($20) — you review a real PR from our codebase and leave written comments

  - If the trial goes well, we start immediately with a 2-week probation period



  Response time: We reply to all qualified applicants within 3 business days. We typically receive 100+ applications within 48 hours, so please make yours specific.



  Looking forward to meeting you.

title: Business Administration Officer - Permanent Remote, Flexible Hours (+10 GMT)
description:
*** DO NOT APPLY UNTIL YOU HAVE READ THIS AD IN FULL ***

Amigo Technology is an IT service business and Managed Service Provider (MSP), located on the Sunshine Coast, Australia. We have been operating for 15 years, with the goal of making computers and technology friendlier to our awesome small business clients. We are seeking an administrative officer to join our friendly team.



By joining the Amigo team, you will enjoy:



- A flexible work-from-home position, ideally between 25 and 35 hours per week, on a schedule that works for you

- A friendly team atmosphere where you’ll need a good sense of humour!

- Daily opportunities to help ordinary people with technology challenges in a team environment, with the goal of making technology friendly

- Competitive earnings, typically between 300php and 370php per hour, depending on ability and experience, plus bonuses



We are seeking a candidate who has:



- A keen interest in working in a process-driven environment and working together with a technology-focused team

- A desire to utilise a mix of creative and process-based problem solving

- Excellent English, both written and spoken

- A high level of attention to detail - you must put the word "AMIGO" in the “Additional Comments” section of our application form to be considered!

- A good sense of humour!



This position will have many opportunities for growth, and over time you will have access to internal mentoring, certificates and training programs to encourage you to work with a wider range of systems. Prior experience with the following would be greatly appreciated and will lead to greater earnings, although this is not a requirement:



- At least two years of experience working in an business administration position, ideally in IT services organisation

- Experience with various features of Xero, such as bank rules, activity statements, reporting and troubleshooting account issues

- Familiarity or experience with the Australian taxation system

- Ability to work with a variety of documents and spreadsheets, including the use of formulas and advanced formatting

- Experience with AI tools and automation



Your duties will include the following:



- Manage financial operations including accounts payable and receivable, bank reconciliation, billing, payroll processing, and financial reporting via Xero

- Oversee the complete client lifecycle by coordinating Managed Services Client (MSC) onboarding and offboarding, tracking SLA performance, and maintaining strong ongoing client relationships.

- Provide essential operational support through inventory and RMA management, meeting coordination, and regular audits of technician maintenance schedules via Quire.

- Coordinate human resources functions such as recruitment support, team rostering, leave management, and employee onboarding.

- Drive process improvement and compliance by auditing software licensing, reviewing team communications for quality, managing legal documentation, and identifying opportunities for workflow automation.

- Maintain the company's digital presence and sales collateral by executing
 campaigns, performing basic WordPress website updates, basic social media management, and organising centralised documentation.



If you have made it this far, great! Before you apply:



- You will be expected to learn quickly and contribute as part of a team. The workload will be both challenging and rewarding.

- We conduct background checks and our team is required to use managed remote workstations. Dishonest conduct will be quickly caught. If you’re thinking of using a mouse jiggler or being OE, please don’t apply.

- Applicants MUST submit their application via this form to be considered - all other application methods will be IGNORED: 
 



Please also check and re-check the links to your resume to ensure they are correct. We will only contact valid submissions. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Copywriter / Thought Leadership Writer
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled copywriter who can do far more than write polished words. This role is for someone who can think strategically, hold a founder’s voice with precision, and translate complex ideas into clear, compelling messaging across platforms.



This is not a plug-and-play copy role. The right person will know how to shape thought leadership, protect nuance, and support a brand with depth, intelligence, and editorial judgment.

What We’re Looking For:



Strategic Copywriter

 You think like a brand strategist who writes, not just a writer waiting for instructions. You can translate high-level ideas into grounded, clear messaging and understand how copy contributes to long-term brand authority, positioning, and trust.



You know how to:

Turn thought leadership into language that feels clear and resonant

Hold context across multiple offers, platforms, and seasons

Build messaging that strengthens authority over time, not just immediate engagement



Deep Fluency in Female Leadership Language



This role is best suited for a woman who understands the nuances of modern female leadership from lived experience.

You should feel comfortable writing about:



Power without performative masculinity

Authority without arrogance

Identity, discernment, boundaries, and self-trust

The emotional interior of leadership

The tone is not “girlboss,” and it is not corporate. It is grounded, intelligent, and embodied.



Ability to Hold and Protect a Distinct Voice



The right writer must be able to enter an established voice without flattening or diluting it.

You should be able to:

Match cadence, rhythm, and emphasis

Write conversationally without sounding casual

Be bold without becoming aggressive

Be warm without becoming soft

This requires taste, restraint, and strong listening skills.



Strong Long-Form Writing Ability



This is not a short-caption-only role. You should be confident writing and shaping:

 sequences that build over time

Long-form posts, essays, and leadership narratives

Workshop descriptions and progra
ssaging

Thought pieces that require structure, pacing, and discernment

You should also have strong editorial instincts and know what should be said, what should be refined, and what should be left unsaid.



High Emotional Intelligence



This role sits close to the founder’s thinking. You must be able to read between the lines, work from voice notes or partially formed ideas, and handle feedback with maturity.

The right person knows how to:

Ask thoughtful, clarifying questions without over-questioning

Interpret nuance, subtext, and intention

Know when to push an idea further and when to protect the message



Comfort With Abstract Ideas

The work often lives in concepts, frameworks, and invisible architecture. You should enjoy working with ideas that are still forming and helping shape them into language people can immediately recognize themselves in.



Platform Versatility



You should be able to write across:




Instagram

LinkedIn

Sales pages

Workshop and program positioning



Professional Maturity



We need someone who is dependable, discreet, and collaborative. This person should manage deadlines responsibly, hold context well, and understand the level of confidentiality that comes with founder-facing work.



Strong Taste and Editorial Judgment



This is one of the most important parts of the role. You should know:

What not to say

When something is too much

When clarity matters more than cleverness

When simplicity or restraint is more powerful than saying more



Key Responsibilities



-Content

Plan out monthly content calendars

Write LinkedIn and Meta posts tied to the content plan and current offers

Write weekly articles

Turn notes, voice notes, or training transcripts into finished content

Research positioning, trends, current language, relevant examples, and insights to inform future content



-Campaigns and Launches

Create campaign briefs

Write promotional, sales, and fulfillment
s

Write support landing pages and other offer-related copy

Develop swipe copy and launch messaging as needed



-Reporting and Performance

Track
 and content performance, including opens, clicks, engagement, and reach

Gather performance insights regularly

Use data to inform rewrites, content adjustments, and future messaging decisions



-Collaboration and Revisions

Revise
s, posts, and other copy based on feedback

Collaborate closely with the founder or team to shape ideas into finished messaging

Handle ad hoc copy requests as needed



Additional Requirements



Must be available to work during PST hours

Can start part-time, with the opportunity to expand hours as responsibilities grow

Starting rate is $7.50 USD per hour, with potential for an increase after the first month based on performance and fit

Must be comfortable working in a collaborative, founder-facing role that requires discretion, responsiveness, and strong follow-through



Bonus Qualifications

These are not required, but would be strong indicators of fit:

Background in psychology, leadership, coaching, philosophy, literature, or narrative work

Experience writing for founders, thought leaders, or experts

Comfort working behind the scenes through ghostwriting, without needing visibility or credit



Ideal Fit

This role is for someone thoughtful, sharp, emotionally intelligent, and deeply attuned to voice. You are not just producing copy. You are helping shape and protect a founder’s message with care, precision, and depth.



To apply:



Send your resume and sample work to 

Applications that do not meet the requirements will not be considered

title: AI-Powered Social Media Manager (VA) | Full-Time | Remote
description:
Are you someone who works smarter, not just harder? Do you know how to leverage AI tools to produce high-quality content at scale — without sacrificing creativity? If so, we want YOU.



???? Position: AI-Powered Social Media Manager – Virtual Assistant

???? Hours: Full-Time (40 hrs/week)

???? Schedule: Monday – Friday | 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM PST

???? Rate: $7.50/hr USD

???? Location: Remote (Overseas Applicants Welcome)



? What Makes This Role Different:

-We manage multiple brands and we move fast. We're not looking for someone who spends half a day crafting a single post. We need a self-starter who has mastered AI-powered workflows to produce compelling content efficiently and at volume — without losing quality.

-If you're still doing everything manually, this probably isn't the right fit. But if you've cracked the code on using AI to speed up your creative process, keep reading.



???? What You'll Be Doing:



-Managing and scheduling content across multiple brand accounts simultaneously

-Using AI tools to rapidly produce graphics, videos, captions, and ad creatives

-Monitoring analytics across brands and adjusting strategy based on performance

-Running and optimizing paid social media ad campaigns

-Keeping each brand's voice consistent while working efficiently across all of them

-Staying ahead of trends and proactively bringing fresh ideas to the table





? Required Tools — You Must Know These:



-Design & Video: Canva, CapCut

-Scheduling & Planning: Loomly, Metricool

-Ad Management: Meta Business Suite

-AI Ad & Content Creators: Creatify.ai, Zeely.ai, Blaze.ai

-AI Assistants: Claude, ChatGPT



These aren't "nice to haves." We expect you to use these tools daily to maximize your output and streamline your workflow.



???? You're Who We're Looking For If You:



-Take ownership of your time and hold yourself accountable

-Can manage content for multiple brands without dropping the ball

-Know how to produce quality content quickly using AI — not spending hours on a single ad

-Are a self-motivated problem-solver who doesn't need to be micromanaged

-Communicate proactively and professionally in English

-Have a reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace





???? This Is NOT the Right Role If You:



Prefer a slow, traditional content creation process

Need constant supervision or hand-holding

Are not comfortable learning and adapting to new AI tools quickly





? Schedule Note:

This role requires you to be available and online Monday through Friday, 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST). Please confirm your ability to work these hours before applying.



???? How to Apply:



-Subject line must include the word 'Efficient' and your name

-Your resume or CV

-A short video (2–3 min) introducing yourself and explaining how you use AI tools in your current workflow

-Examples of content or ads you've created

-Links to social media accounts or brand pages you've managed

-Interview availability for the next 5 days.

title: Virtual Marketing Coordinator
description:
The nLIVEn Team is an Australian based business executive coaching and management consulting business on a mission to help individuals, teams and organisations unlock their full potential. We work with ambitious people who want real, lasting change — and our marketing needs to reflect that energy.



We're looking for a part-time or full-time Marketing Coordinator with a passion for growing a boutique professional service firm style businesses to join us and help bring more of the right clients into our world.



What you'll do - things like:



- Run our content calendar across LinkedIn, Instagram, and

- Write copy that sounds like us — real, energetic, and value-packed

- Grow and nurture our
 list with campaigns that convert

- Track what's working and double down on it

- Help promote events, webinars, and new offers



You're a great fit if you…



- Have 5+ years in marketing or content — coaching/consulting experience is a big plus

- In your late 20s to early 30s and looking for a great, secure place to settle into the next stage of your career

- Write with personality and can adapt to multiple brand voices quickly

- Take ownership and don't need hand-holding

- Get excited by watching numbers move in the right direction

- Want to be part of something that genuinely helps people



What we offer:



- Flexible part-time or full-time hours — work when it suits you (e.g. 5-9 hours per day, Monday to Friday, with a 1 hour unpaid lunch break)

- A collaborative, high-energy team that's growing fast

- Real ownership of your work — your impact is visible

- Opportunity to grow with the business

- A coaching culture that values and rewards personal and professional learning, growth and development and team achievement 



How to apply: 



- Send us a short intro (3–5 sentences on why you're the one), a link to any work samples or your LinkedIn, and your answer to this question: "What's one underrated marketing tactic that boutique coaching and consulting businesses should be using?"

- Applications without the question answered will not be considered — we want to see how you listen, think and speak (in writing)



The role could start as full-time or grow from part-time to full-time position in the future, or we can add other virtual tea
mbers if you prefer to stay part-time.

This role requires excellent oral and written English communication skills, high attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate is proactive, organised, and capable of working both independently and as part of a team.

Base remuneration of AUD$5-$10/hour, depending on experience and full time equivalent (FTE).

title: Freelance Web Developer
description:
Ultimate Gainz is a growing women’s activewear e-commerce brand based on Shopify. We’re looking for a skilled and reliable freelance web developer who can jump in when needed to solve problems, build new features, and keep our online store running smoothly.



What You’ll Do

- Assist with API integrations (Shopify REST/GraphQL, third-party services)

- Occasionally support general web tasks outside of Shopify if needed



Requirements

- Strong experience with Shopify (Liquid, theme customization, Shopify APIs)

- Comfortable working with REST APIs and basic backend logic

- Problem-solver mindset — you figure things out instead of waiting for instructions

- Fast and clear communicator (English)

- Available during reasonable hours for quick turnaround when tasks come up

- Bonus: experience with Node.js, React, or Python



Work Arrangement

- On-call / as-needed basis — this is NOT a fixed-hours position

- Tasks will come in as they arise; some weeks may be busy, others quiet

- You’ll be paid for actual hours worked, tracked honestly



How to Apply

- Send a message with:

- A brief intro about yourself and your experience

- Examples of Shopify stores or web projects you’ve worked on

title: Lead to Lease Specialist
description:
Lead to Lease Specialist



Job Type: Available for Full time and Part time role

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, an 9-hour shift including a 1-hour break (8-hour working shift, time zone to be finalized)

Salary: $1,000 per month (Full time) | $500 per month (Part time)



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a confident and driven Lead to Lease Specialist to manage inbound inquiries and proactively engage prospective residents through outbound calls. In this role, you will play a key part in converting leads into scheduled property tours by delivering a seamless and informative experience. 

The ideal candidate is highly comfortable on the phone, possesses strong communication skills, and can clearly explain the self-guided showing process while building rapport and a sense of urgency with prospects. This position requires a proactive approach, attention to detail, and the ability to effectively nurture leads throughout the leasing journey to support occupancy goals.

This role is ideal for a driven leasing professional who thrives in a fast-paced, performance-based environment and is motivated by turning leads into qualified applicants.



* Key Responsibilities:

Serve as the primary point of contact for all inbound leasing inquiries (phone,
, and online leads)

Make outbound calls to new and existing leads to increase tour scheduling and application conversions

Respond promptly to new leads and follow up consistently to drive engagement

Qualify prospective residents based on rental criteria and property fit

Clearly explain the self-showing process and assist prospects with scheduling tours

Maintain accurate lead tracking and notes within company systems

Collaborate with Property Managers and Marketing to ensure alignment on availability and listing details

Follow up with prospects after tours to encourage applications



* Performance Expectations:

Success in this role is measured by conversion metrics, specifically:

Leads converted to scheduled tours

Tours converted to completed applications



* Required Skills & Qualifications:

Prior property management or leasing experience required

Experience with AppFolio (required)

Familiarity with Rently and Tenant Turner (preferred)

Comfortable handling both inbound and outbound calls

Strong phone presence with the ability to build rapport quickly

Clear, professional communication skills

Goal-oriented with a strong focus on conversion and results

Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline



* Nice to Have

Experience in a lead-to-lease or leasing conversion-focused role



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler
description:
