Nokvex is a Philippines-based content studio serving remote agencies and freelancers across Australia and North America. We offer flexible payment in USD or PHP, treat our team as long-term partners, and keep communication clear and respectful.



---



The Role



We're looking for a Part-Time Content Creator with light admin support responsibilities. This is a long-term role with a clear path to full-time.



20 hours/week | $300/month USD ($70/week) | Weekly payment | Starting immediately



---



Schedule



- 20 hours/week distributed across Monday to Friday primarily

- Flexible - you choose your daily hours within PHT business time

- Occasional weekend support (max 2x/month) for urgent content or time-sensitive posts

- Results-based, not hour-based monitoring



---



Main Responsibilities



1. Video Editing (40%)

- 2 long-form YouTube videos per month (8-15 minutes each)

- 8 short-form videos per month (30-60 seconds, Reels/Shorts/TikTok)

- AI education content, cartoon/Nickelodeon-inspired style

- Dynamic captions, B-roll, basic motion graphics



2. Graphic Design (20%)

- YouTube thumbnails

- Social media post graphics (Canva)

- Simple branded assets



3. AI Asset Generation (15%)

- Image generation (Nano Banana, Midjourney, or similar)

- Character art, backgrounds, supporting visuals

- Following detailed briefs



4. Social Media Management (15%)

- Scheduling posts across Instagram,
, TikTok

- Basic caption drafting

- Engagement monitoring



5. Light Admin Support (10%)

- File organization (Google Drive)

- Basic research tasks (competitor analysis, data gathering)

- Spreadsheet updates

- Simple documentation



---



Growth Path



As our content volume grows, this role will evolve:



- Month 4-6: Hours may increase to 30-40 hrs/week, salary $450-$600

- Month 7-12: Option for full-time at $650-$800/month

- Scope will narrow to specialization (video editing + graphic design focus)

- SMM and admin tasks will transfer to other tea
mbers



Salary reviewed every 3 months based on performance.



---



Who You Are



- 1-2+ years experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve)

- Portfolio showing YouTube long-form AND short-form work

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva minimum)

- Familiar with AI image tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar) OR willing to learn fast

- Comfortable with social media scheduling tools

- Good English written communication

- Reliable internet (backup required)

- Available during regular PHT business hours



Bonus Points:

- Experience with cartoon/animation-style editing

- After Effects skills

- Thumbnail design portfolio (YouTube-specific)

- AI education or tech content experience



---



What We Offer



- $300 USD/month ($70/week), paid weekly via Wise

- 20 hours/week with flexible schedule

- Occasional weekend availability for time-sensitive tasks (max 2x/month)

- 13th month bonus after 6 months of continuous service

- 5 days paid time off per year, available after 3 months

- Clear 12-month growth path (part-time ? full-time)

- Long-term collaboration, not a gig

- Respectful, async-first work culture



---



How to Apply



Please send:



1. Your portfolio link (video editing + graphic design samples)

2. Short answer: What's your favorite editing project and why?

3. A 30-second Loom video introducing yourself

4. Your availability (days and PHT hours)



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 3 days and reply to everyone.



Learn more at

Who thrives in a fast-paced environment, works independently, and consistently delivers accurate, high-quality results. Many customer interactions will be supported by AI tools, so efficiency and adaptability are key.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage daily workflows using internal spreadsheets and operational tools, ensuring all records are accurate and up to date

• Respond to HelpScout tickets efficiently (target: 30–40 tickets per hour) while maintaining high-quality support

• Handle return requests in line with company policy, including offering resolutions such as discounts, refunds, or return instructions

• Report damaged, incorrect, or missing items to suppliers and secure timely replacements or refunds

• Coordinate closely with suppliers on shipment updates, fulfillment issues, cancellations, and inventory concerns

• Monitor and follow up on all unfulfilled Shopify orders, resolving issues related to sizing, color, (add the word "sky" on the subject line when applying) stock availability, and address verification

• Collaborate cross-functionally with Customer Service and Supply Chain teams to ensure seamless operations



Qualifications

• Required: Proven experience in fashion dropshipping and order fulfillment (applications without this will not be considered)

• Strong hands-on experience with CJ Dropshipping, especially in order processing and supplier coordination

• Experience using platforms such as Shopify, HelpScout, Zendesk, Gorgias, or similar tools

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks independently

• Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving and analytical abilities

• Proactive mindset with the confidence to suggest improvements to workflows and processes



What We Offer

• Competitive salary + performance-based (KPI) bonuses

• Fully remote, long-term position

• Flexible schedule within agreed working hours

• Opportunities for growth and advancement as the company scales



How to Apply - please submit the following:

• Your CV/Resume

• A 1-minute Loom video explaining how you organize your daily workflow

• A cover letter outlining your experience in fashion dropshipping, supplier coordination, and order fulfillment, and why you’re a strong fit for this role

title: Media Buyer and Creative Strategist Meta
description:
We are looking for an experienced Meta Media Buyer and Creative Strategist who wants to take full ownership, build a proper system, and lead the paid media of a growing premium ecommerce brand.

 

About the Role

 

Our brand sells a premium natural product on Meta 
 and Instagram). We have tested creative, gathered data, and learned a lot, but our systems are still hit and miss. We are looking for someone who brings their own proven approach, takes the lead, and builds something stronger from the ground up.

 

You will own Meta paid media strategy, customer persona research, creative angle development, testing structure, cutting and scaling decisions, and weekly reporting. You will also communicate regularly and walk us through your decisions clearly.

 

Who We Are Looking For

 

Proven track record scaling ecommerce brands profitably on Meta.

 

Your own performance tracking and creative testing system. Please be ready to share a sample or redacted example.

 

Clear, repeatable cutting and scaling logic.

 

Comfortable with AI and creative tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Canva, CapCut, Midjourney, Runway, Triple Whale, Motion, Foreplay, or similar. You are welcome to use any tools you feel comfortable with and able to use effectively.

 

Strong written and spoken English.

 

Autonomous, reliable, and able to lead rather than wait for instructions.

 

Engagement and Hours

 

We are looking for an intermediate to senior level Media Buyer and Creative Strategist. Full time remote is preferred, though we are open to starting part time with the right candidate and a path to full time as the working relationship develops. Expected hours are between 20 and 40 per week depending on engagement and preference. Please propose the rate that works best for you based on your experience.

 

How to Apply

 

1. Start your message with the word TEAK so we know you read this in full.

 

2. Answer briefly. Short, direct answers are welcome.

 

   a. Which brands have you scaled profitably on Meta and what was the ROAS trajectory.

 

   b. What does your first 30 days working with an ecommerce brand look like.

 

   c. Do you work from your own performance tracking and creative testing spreadsheets. Please share a sample or redacted example if possible.

 

   d. Are you willing to regularly communicate and comfortable walking us through your decisions, reasoning, and changes as we go.

 

3. Propose your preferred engagement type and rate.

 

We are more interested in how you think than how you pitch.

 

If the fit feels right on both sides, we will move forward with a short intro call and further communication.

title: US Tax Strategist – Small Business Tax Planning (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Salary: $2,400 – $3,200/month USD (based on experience)

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week

Schedule: Monday - Friday 8am-5pm US Central Time

Start: As soon as the right person is found



About Us

Sin City CFO is a US-based tax advisory firm that helps online business owners — coaches, consultants, agencies, and creators — legally reduce their tax burden through proactive, year-round planning.

We don't file tax returns. We build tax strategies, implement them, and track every dollar saved. A partner CPA/EA firm handles the filing. We handle everything that makes the filing matter.

This is a stable, long-term role with a growing firm. We're looking for someone who wants to build something — not just fill a seat.



What This Role Is

You will own the backend tax planning operations for our client portfolio. That means building strategy plans, implementing and tracking strategies, and maintaining a clear savings report card for every client so they always know exactly what their tax plan is worth.

You will not meet directly with clients. But your work is what our advisors present and stand behind in every client conversation.

This role is right for you if you take pride in building systems, staying ahead of deadlines, and solving problems before someone has to ask.



Your Responsibilities

- Build and maintain a personalized tax strategy plan for each client

- Implement strategies and track projected vs. actual tax savings throughout the year

- Maintain a tax savings report card per client — clear, current, and auditable

- Identify new planning opportunities as client situations evolve

- Build and document repeatable workflows so the work runs consistently without constant direction



US Tax Strategies You Must Know

- S-Corporation election and reasonable compensation planning

- Qualified Business Income (QBI) deduction optimization

- Augusta Rule (Section 280A)

- SEP IRA, Solo 401(k), and defined benefit retirement plan structuring

- Entity structuring for tax efficiency

- Cost segregation (conceptual working knowledge)



Experience with US small business taxation is required. This is not a bookkeeping or return preparation role — it is a planning and strategy role.



You're a Great Fit If You:

- Have hands-on experience implementing US tax strategies for small business owners

- Can build a tax plan from a client's income, entity, and goals — without needing step-by-step direction

- Naturally spot what's missing in a plan, not just what was asked for

- Build checklists and workflows so your work is consistent and doesn't rely on memory

- Write clearly and communicate proactively — this is a fully remote, async role

- Are looking for a long-term role where you can grow with a firm, not just complete a project



About Working With Us

- Full-time, fully remote

- US business hours  (Central Time Zone)

- Long-term position — we're building a team, not filling a short-term gap

- You'll have clear ownership of your work and room to build systems your way

 and Slack

-

-

$350–$500/month base with performance bonuses

-

Again, please make sure you fill out the Google form as a majority of the review process will be done through this Google form.

s
